title: Keynote
gloss: 主題演講
takeaway: 這是 WWDC 2026 的開場主題演講，揭露 Apple 各平台軟體的全新功能與技術方向。

points.text: 揭露最新的 Apple 軟體與技術，是掌握本屆 WWDC 全貌的**開場主題演講**。
涵蓋各平台的**平台改進（Platform improvements）**，預告整年度的開發方向。
說明在**信任與安全（Trust and safety）**方面的進展。
聚焦 **Apple Intelligence 與 Siri** 的新能力。

audience: **所有 Apple 平台的開發者**，想一次掌握本屆 WWDC 重點方向的人。
gloss_en: Keynote
takeaway_en: This is the WWDC 2026 opening keynote, revealing the new features and technical direction across Apple's platform software.

points_en.text: Reveals the latest Apple software and technologies; the **opening keynote** for grasping the full picture of this year's WWDC.
Covers **platform improvements** across every platform, previewing the development direction for the year ahead.
Explains progress on **trust and safety**.
Focuses on the new capabilities of **Apple Intelligence and Siri**.

audience_en: **Developers across all Apple platforms** who want to grasp this year's WWDC priorities in one go.

title: Platforms State of the Union
gloss: 平台現況報告
takeaway: 這是 WWDC26 開發者方向的總覽，先看它能快速掌握各平台與框架的年度重點。

points.text: **Platforms State of the Union** 是 WWDC 開發者場次的開場，集中介紹 Apple 各平台最新的技術進展。
內容定位為**年度總覽**，適合用來規劃接下來要深入觀看哪些主題的細部場次。
原始資料未提供章節與程式碼，**細節需搭配各專題場次**補齊。

audience: 所有 Apple 平台開發者，特別是想**先綜覽今年技術重點**再決定深入方向的人。
gloss_en: Platforms State of the Union
takeaway_en: This is the developer-focused overview for WWDC26; watch it first to quickly grasp the year's highlights across each platform and framework.

points_en.text: **Platforms State of the Union** opens the developer sessions at WWDC, focusing on the latest technical advancements across Apple's platforms.
It is framed as an **annual overview**, ideal for planning which deep-dive topic sessions to watch next.
The source material provides no chapters or code, so the **details need to be filled in from the individual topic sessions**.

audience_en: All Apple platform developers, especially those who want to **get a broad overview of this year's technical highlights** before deciding where to dig deeper.

title: Keynote (ASL)
gloss: 主題演講(美國手語版)
takeaway: WWDC26 開場主題演講,一次揭曉今年 Apple 各平台軟體與技術的重點走向,適合先看完掌握全貌再深入個別 session。

points.text: **Keynote** 是 WWDC26 的開場,揭曉今年最新的 Apple 軟體與技術方向。
「**Platform improvements**」章節涵蓋各平台(iOS / iPadOS / macOS 等)的整體更新。
「**Trust and safety**」聚焦隱私、安全與使用者信任相關的新功能。
「**Apple Intelligence and Siri**」是壓軸,呈現 AI 與 Siri 的最新進展。
本場為 **ASL(美國手語)** 版本,內容與標準 Keynote 相同。

audience: **所有想一次掌握 WWDC26 全貌的開發者**,看完再依興趣深入各專門 session。
gloss_en: Keynote (American Sign Language)
takeaway_en: The WWDC26 opening keynote reveals this year's direction for Apple's software and technologies across all platforms—watch it first to get the big picture before diving into individual sessions.

points_en.text: The **Keynote** opens WWDC26, revealing this year's latest Apple software and technology direction.
The "**Platform improvements**" chapter covers the overall updates across each platform (iOS / iPadOS / macOS, etc.).
"**Trust and safety**" focuses on new features around privacy, security, and user trust.
"**Apple Intelligence and Siri**" is the finale, showcasing the latest advances in AI and Siri.
This is the **ASL (American Sign Language)** version, with the same content as the standard Keynote.

audience_en: **Any developer who wants to grasp the full picture of WWDC26 in one go**, then dive into the specialized sessions based on their interests.

title: Platforms State of the Union (ASL)
gloss: 平台現況報告（美國手語版）
takeaway: 這是面向開發者的年度技術總覽，一次掌握 Apple 各平台最新的開發框架與工具方向。

points.text: 面向開發者的年度重點場次，揭露 **Apple 各平台最新的技術進展**。
可作為規劃整年度採用新 API 與框架的**起點與索引**。
本場為**美國手語（ASL）**版本，提供無障礙的觀看選擇。

audience: **所有 Apple 平台的開發者**，想在主題演講之外更深入掌握技術細節的人。
gloss_en: Platforms State of the Union (American Sign Language)
takeaway_en: This is the annual developer-focused technical overview that brings you up to speed on the latest development frameworks and tooling direction across Apple's platforms in one session.

points_en.text: The annual developer highlight session, unveiling **the latest technical advances across Apple's platforms**.
Use it as a **starting point and index** for planning which new APIs and frameworks to adopt over the year.
This is the **American Sign Language (ASL)** version, offering an accessible viewing option.

audience_en: **Developers across all Apple platforms** who want to go deeper into the technical details beyond the keynote.

title: Announcing Apple’s next big step for Siri and iPhone
gloss: 宣布 Apple 為 Siri 與 iPhone 邁出的下一大步
takeaway: iOS 27 將帶來全新一代的 **Siri AI** 與生成式影像能力，是本屆 Apple Intelligence 的重大方向預告。

points.text: iOS 27 推出能力更強的全新 **Siri AI**，象徵 Apple 智慧助理的重大躍進。
導入**新一代生成式 AI 影像**技術，可轉換並重新詮釋使用者的相片。
強調能產生**逼真影像（photorealistic imagery）**的生成式模型。
屬於簡短的公告影片，後續可關注更深入的開發者技術場次。

audience: **關注 Apple Intelligence 與 Siri 未來方向**的開發者與決策者。
gloss_en: Announcing Apple's next big step for Siri and iPhone
takeaway_en: iOS 27 brings a new generation of **Siri AI** and generative imagery, serving as the major directional preview of this year's Apple Intelligence.

points_en.text: iOS 27 introduces a more capable new **Siri AI**, marking a major leap forward for Apple's intelligent assistant.
Brings in **next-generation generative AI imagery** that can transform and reinterpret users' photos.
Highlights generative models capable of producing **photorealistic imagery**.
This is a short announcement video; watch for the more in-depth developer technical sessions to follow.

audience_en: Developers and decision-makers **focused on the future direction of Apple Intelligence and Siri**.

title: WWDC26 Platforms State of the Union Recap
gloss: WWDC26 平台現況演講重點回顧
takeaway: 用五分鐘快速掌握 WWDC26 為 App 與遊戲帶來的最新平台進展。

points.text: 這是 **Platforms State of the Union** 的濃縮回顧，一次掃過今年所有重大平台更新。
內容同時涵蓋 **App 與遊戲**，協助開發者快速判斷哪些新技術值得深入。
全片僅約 **五分鐘**，適合作為當週議程的導覽起點。
看完後可依興趣再前往對應的深入議程取得實作細節。

audience: 想要**快速綜覽今年平台更新**、再決定深入方向的所有 Apple 平台開發者。
gloss_en: WWDC26 Platforms State of the Union recap
takeaway_en: Get up to speed in five minutes on the latest platform advances WWDC26 brings to apps and games.

points_en.text: A condensed recap of the **Platforms State of the Union**, sweeping through all of this year's major platform updates at once.
Covers both **apps and games**, helping developers quickly judge which new technologies are worth digging into.
The whole thing runs only about **five minutes**, making it a great starting point for navigating the week's sessions.
Afterward, you can head to the corresponding deep-dive sessions based on your interests for implementation details.

audience_en: All Apple platform developers who want a **quick overview of this year's platform updates** before deciding where to dive deeper.

title: Secure your apps with App Attest
gloss: 運用 App Attest 保護你的 App
takeaway: 透過 App Attest 的金鑰證明與斷言機制，驗證請求確實來自未被竄改的正版 App，藉此抵禦詐欺與偽造攻擊。

points.text: 攻擊者會利用**竄改過的 App**冒充正版來詐騙，**App Attest** 能讓你的伺服器確認請求來自合法且未修改的 App。
先用 **DCAppAttestService** 在 **Secure Enclave** 中產生綁定裝置的金鑰（generateKey），再以 attestKey 取得證明交給伺服器驗證。
後續每個請求用 **generateAssertion** 搭配 clientDataHash 簽署，伺服器即可驗證請求完整性。
介紹常見**陷阱**（common pitfalls）與**詐欺指標**（fraud metric），協助評估保護成效並避免實作錯誤。

audience: **需要在伺服器端抵禦詐欺與 App 竄改**的開發者，特別是涉及金流、帳號或敏感資料的服務。
gloss_en: Protect your app with App Attest
takeaway_en: Use App Attest's key attestation and assertion mechanisms to verify that requests genuinely come from an untampered, legitimate app, defending against fraud and spoofing attacks.

points_en.text: Attackers use **modified apps** to impersonate the genuine app and commit fraud; **App Attest** lets your server confirm that requests come from a legitimate, unmodified app.
First use **DCAppAttestService** to generate a device-bound key in the **Secure Enclave** (generateKey), then call attestKey to obtain an attestation that your server verifies.
Sign each subsequent request with **generateAssertion** plus a clientDataHash so the server can verify request integrity.
Covers **common pitfalls** and **fraud metrics** to help you assess protection effectiveness and avoid implementation mistakes.

audience_en: Developers who **need to defend against fraud and app tampering on the server side**, especially for services involving payments, accounts, or sensitive data.

title: Read between the strokes with PencilKit
gloss: 用 PencilKit 解讀筆跡內容
takeaway: 用 PKStrokeRecognizer 在自家 App 中辨識手寫筆跡、產生可索引與可搜尋的文字，並支援路徑轉換與筆畫切割。

points.text: 用驅動 Freeform、備忘錄等 Apple App 的同一套技術，透過 **PKStrokeRecognizer** 為你的 App 解鎖**手寫辨識**。
呼叫 **updateDrawing** 後即可取得 **recognizedText**，把使用者的手寫筆畫轉成文字字串。
辨識結果可產出 **indexableContent** 供索引，並用 **search** 搜尋關鍵字、回傳可高亮的 bounds。
提供**路徑轉換（path conversion）**與**筆畫切割（stroke slicing）**，並改善模型存取方式。

audience: **開發手寫、筆記或繪圖類 App**、想在 PencilKit 畫布上加入文字辨識與搜尋的開發者。
gloss_en: Read handwriting content with PencilKit
takeaway_en: Use PKStrokeRecognizer to recognize handwritten strokes in your own app, producing indexable and searchable text, with support for path conversion and stroke slicing.

points_en.text: Unlock **handwriting recognition** for your app via **PKStrokeRecognizer**, using the same technology that powers Apple apps like Freeform and Notes.
After calling **updateDrawing**, get **recognizedText** to turn the user's handwritten strokes into a text string.
Recognition results can produce **indexableContent** for indexing, and **search** lets you find keywords and return highlightable bounds.
Provides **path conversion** and **stroke slicing**, along with improved model access.

audience_en: Developers **building handwriting, note-taking, or drawing apps** who want to add text recognition and search on a PencilKit canvas.

title: What’s new in WebKit for Safari 27
gloss: Safari 27 中 WebKit 的新功能
takeaway: Safari 27 的 WebKit 帶來 CSS Grid Lanes、可自訂 Select、HTML Model 元素與沉浸式網頁環境等新能力，讓網頁體驗更接近原生。

points.text: **CSS Grid Lanes** 提供更靈活的網格排版方式，簡化複雜版面的實作。
**Customizable Select** 讓開發者能完全自訂下拉選單的外觀與內容，不再受原生樣式限制。
新的 **HTML Model element** 可直接在網頁中嵌入並呈現 3D 模型內容。
**Immersive Website Environments** 帶來沉浸式網頁體驗，並持續強化 **Web Extensions** 與 **MapKit JS**。

audience: 適合**網頁開發者與 Safari 平台開發者**，想掌握 Safari 27 最新 Web 標準與能力的人。
gloss_en: What's new in WebKit for Safari 27
takeaway_en: WebKit in Safari 27 brings CSS Grid Lanes, customizable Select, the HTML Model element, and immersive web environments, making web experiences feel closer to native.

points_en.text: **CSS Grid Lanes** offers a more flexible way to lay out grids, simplifying the implementation of complex layouts.
**Customizable Select** lets developers fully customize the appearance and content of dropdown menus, no longer constrained by native styling.
The new **HTML Model element** can embed and render 3D model content directly in web pages.
**Immersive Website Environments** deliver immersive web experiences, with continued enhancements to **Web Extensions** and **MapKit JS**.

audience_en: For **web developers and Safari platform developers** who want to master the latest Web standards and capabilities in Safari 27.

title: Enhance your presence on the App Store
gloss: 強化你在 App Store 上的呈現
takeaway: 透過新的素材版位與 Asset Library，把你的圖片與影片運用在 App Store 更多地方，更完整地行銷 App 與遊戲。

points.text: 重新思考如何在 App Store 上行銷 App 與遊戲，把自家**圖片與影片**運用到更多新位置。
介紹**新的素材版位（asset placements）**，讓行銷素材出現在更多場景。
推出 **Asset Library** 集中管理你的行銷素材。
提供後續可採取的**下一步**，協助規劃素材投放。

audience: **負責 App Store 行銷與經營的開發者與行銷人員**，想提升商店頁面表現的人。
gloss_en: Enhance your presence on the App Store
takeaway_en: Use new asset placements and the Asset Library to put your images and videos in more places on the App Store, marketing your apps and games more completely.

points_en.text: Reimagine how you market your apps and games on the App Store by using your own **images and videos** in new places.
Introduces **new asset placements** so your marketing assets appear in more contexts.
Launches the **Asset Library** to manage your marketing assets in one place.
Offers actionable **next steps** to help you plan how you deploy your assets.

audience_en: **Developers and marketers who handle App Store marketing and growth** and want to improve their product page performance.

title: What’s new in managing Apple devices
gloss: 管理 Apple 裝置的新功能
takeaway: 若你負責企業或教育環境的裝置管理，這場涵蓋宣告式裝置管理、App 派送與身分整合的最新更新。

points.text: 介紹**宣告式裝置管理（declarative device management）**的最新更新，是裝置管理的核心方向。
涵蓋 **Apple Business Manager** 與 **Apple School Manager** 在服務面的進展。
說明 **App management** 派送與管理的改進，便於大規模佈署應用程式。
包含 **Identity Integrations** 身分整合，以及針對**教育（Education）**情境的更新。

audience: 負責 MDM、企業 IT 或教育機構**大規模裝置與 App 佈署**的管理者與開發者。
gloss_en: What's new in managing Apple devices
takeaway_en: If you manage devices in enterprise or education environments, this session covers the latest updates to declarative device management, app distribution, and identity integration.

points_en.text: Introduces the latest updates to **declarative device management**, the core direction for device management.
Covers service-side advancements in **Apple Business Manager** and **Apple School Manager**.
Explains improvements to **App management** distribution and management, making it easier to deploy apps at scale.
Includes **Identity Integrations** as well as updates for **Education** scenarios.

audience_en: Administrators and developers responsible for MDM, enterprise IT, or educational institutions who handle **large-scale device and app deployment**.

title: Deliver workout insights with HealthKit workout zones
gloss: 用 HealthKit 運動區間呈現訓練洞察
takeaway: HealthKit 新增 workout zones,讓你能直接讀取已完成訓練的心率區間、即時接收區間更新,並為使用者建立預設或自訂的區間設定。
chapters: Reading Heart Rate Zones from a completed workout
Check if Preferred Zone has been set

points.text: HealthKit 讓你更容易提供訓練洞察,例如**心率與騎乘功率區間(workout zones)**。
可從已完成的訓練透過 **workout.zoneGroupsByType** 讀取各區間的數量與停留時間(zoneDurations)。
即時訓練可實作 **HKLiveWorkoutBuilder 的 didUpdateWorkoutZone**,在 @MainActor 上更新目前所在區間。
支援 **preferred zones**:先用 zoneConfiguration(for:) 檢查使用者是否已設定。
可用 **HKWorkoutZoneConfiguration** 以心率邊界陣列建立自訂區間,再以 setCustomZoneConfiguration 套用後 beginCollection。

audience: **開發健身、運動或健康類 App,想呈現心率/功率區間訓練數據的開發者。**
gloss_en: Surface workout insights with HealthKit workout zones
takeaway_en: HealthKit adds workout zones, letting you read heart rate zones from completed workouts, receive live zone updates, and set up preferred or custom zone configurations for users.

points_en.text: HealthKit makes it easier to deliver workout insights, such as **heart rate and cycling power zones (workout zones)**.
From a completed workout, read each zone's count and time spent (zoneDurations) via **workout.zoneGroupsByType**.
For live workouts, implement **HKLiveWorkoutBuilder's didUpdateWorkoutZone** to update the current zone on the @MainActor.
Support **preferred zones**: first check whether the user has configured them with zoneConfiguration(for:).
Use **HKWorkoutZoneConfiguration** to build custom zones from an array of heart rate boundaries, then apply with setCustomZoneConfiguration before beginCollection.

audience_en: **Developers building fitness, workout, or health apps who want to surface heart rate / power zone training data.**

title: What’s new in Wallet
gloss: Apple Wallet 的新功能
takeaway: 用全新的 Poster Generic 樣式、更多條碼類型與 featured actions 翻新你的 Wallet 票券，並用 Pass Designer 與 PassBuilder 加速製作與簽署流程。
chapters: Adopting Poster Generic with Generic fallback
Barcodes: Add new types for iOS 27

points.text: 採用全新的 **Poster Generic** 票券樣式，並可同時保留 `generic` 欄位作為 iOS 26 以前的後備。
新增更多**條碼格式（barcodes）**，例如 `PKBarcodeFormatCodabar`，並可同時提供 QR 等格式以相容舊版系統。
透過 **featured actions** 在票券上加入會員權益、優惠等可點擊動作。
用新的 **Pass Designer** 視覺化設計票券模板，並用 **Pass Builder（PassBuilder）** 套件在伺服器端建立與簽署 `.pkpass`。

audience: **開發 Apple Wallet 票券（會員卡、票券、優惠券）的開發者**，想更新樣式並簡化後端產製流程的人。
gloss_en: What's new in Wallet
takeaway_en: Refresh your Wallet passes with the new Poster Generic style, more barcode types, and featured actions, and speed up authoring and signing with Pass Designer and PassBuilder.

points_en.text: Adopt the new **Poster Generic** pass style, while keeping a `generic` field as a fallback for systems prior to iOS 26.
Add more **barcode formats**, such as `PKBarcodeFormatCodabar`, while still offering formats like QR for compatibility with older systems.
Use **featured actions** to add tappable actions like membership benefits and offers onto a pass.
Design pass templates visually with the new **Pass Designer**, and build and sign `.pkpass` files server-side with the **Pass Builder (PassBuilder)** package.

audience_en: **Developers building Apple Wallet passes (membership cards, tickets, coupons)** who want to update styling and simplify their backend production pipeline.

title: What’s new in Apple In-App Purchase
gloss: Apple App 內購買的新功能
takeaway: 新增「**附 12 個月承諾的月繳訂閱**」，讓使用者以更實惠的月付方式訂閱，並可用 StoreKit 完整呈現與購買。
chapters: Overview of monthly subscriptions with a 12-month commitment
Set up in App Store Connect
Merchandise pricing terms with StoreKit views
Get subscription pricing terms and make a purchase
Sheet to manage subscriptions by subscriptionGroupID
Monitor subscriptions with App Store Server APIs
JWSTransaction (decoded) for a monthly subscription with a 12-month commitment
JWSRenewalInfo (decoded) for a monthly subscription with a 12-month commitment
Sheet to redeem an offer code

points.text: 推出**附 12 個月承諾的月繳訂閱（monthly subscription with a 12-month commitment）**，提供比年繳更易入手的付費選項。
可在 **App Store Connect** 設定此方案，並透過 `SubscriptionStoreView` 的 `preferredSubscriptionPricingTerms` 呈現月價與總承諾金額。
以 `Product.purchase` 搭配 `billingPlanType(.monthly)` 進行購買，並用 `manageSubscriptionsSheet` 依 `subscriptionGroupID` 管理訂閱。
後端可用 **App Store Server API** 監控，解碼後的 `JWSTransaction` 與 `JWSRenewalInfo` 帶有 `commitmentInfo` 承諾資訊。
涵蓋 **Bundles 與 Suites**、優惠代碼兌換（`offerCodeRedemption`）以及更完善的送審體驗。

audience: **販售訂閱制的 App 開發者與商務團隊**，想導入更彈性月繳方案的人。
gloss_en: What's new in Apple In-App Purchase
takeaway_en: Adds **monthly subscriptions with a 12-month commitment**, giving users a more affordable monthly way to subscribe, with full StoreKit presentation and purchasing.

points_en.text: Introduces the **monthly subscription with a 12-month commitment**, offering a more accessible payment option than an annual plan.
Configure this plan in **App Store Connect** and present the monthly price and total commitment amount via `SubscriptionStoreView`'s `preferredSubscriptionPricingTerms`.
Purchase with `Product.purchase` using `billingPlanType(.monthly)`, and manage subscriptions with `manageSubscriptionsSheet` keyed by `subscriptionGroupID`.
On the backend, monitor with the **App Store Server API**; the decoded `JWSTransaction` and `JWSRenewalInfo` carry `commitmentInfo`.
Covers **Bundles and Suites**, offer code redemption (`offerCodeRedemption`), and a more refined review submission experience.

audience_en: **App developers and business teams selling subscriptions** who want to adopt a more flexible monthly plan.

title: Rev up your CarPlay app
gloss: 強化你的 CarPlay App
takeaway: 運用 CarPlay framework 的新功能，為音訊、導航與對話式 App 打造更完整的車載體驗。
chapters: Disable route sharing for this trip

points.text: 全面檢視 **CarPlay framework** 對音訊、導航與語音對話式 App 的新支援能力。
可透過 **CPNowPlayingTemplate.allowsMiniPlayer** 停用 MiniPlayer，自訂正在播放畫面的呈現方式。
導航 App 可實作 **mapTemplateShouldProvideRouteSharing** 啟用路線分享，並針對單次行程選擇關閉。
新增 **CarPlay 視訊** 能力，拓展車載情境下可呈現的內容類型。
使用 **CarPlay Simulator** 在無實體車機的情況下開發與測試介面。

audience: 開發 **CarPlay 音訊、導航或對話式 App** 並想採用今年新功能的 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Rev up your CarPlay app
takeaway_en: Use the new capabilities in the CarPlay framework to build a more complete in-car experience for audio, navigation, and conversational apps.

points_en.text: A full look at the **CarPlay framework**'s new support for audio, navigation, and voice-based conversational apps.
Use **CPNowPlayingTemplate.allowsMiniPlayer** to disable the MiniPlayer and customize how the Now Playing screen is presented.
Navigation apps can implement **mapTemplateShouldProvideRouteSharing** to enable route sharing, opting out on a per-trip basis.
Adds **CarPlay video** support, expanding the kinds of content you can present in the in-car context.
Use the **CarPlay Simulator** to develop and test your interface without physical car hardware.

audience_en: iOS developers building **CarPlay audio, navigation, or conversational apps** who want to adopt this year's new features.

title: Translate your app using agents in Xcode
gloss: 在 Xcode 中運用 agent 翻譯你的 App
takeaway: 利用 Xcode 的 coding agent 結合 App 上下文翻譯 String Catalog，並透過審閱與迭代產出高品質的在地化字串。
chapters: Localizing strings in SwiftUI with custom table name
Field for machine-translated strings in the XLIFF

points.text: **Xcode 與 coding agent** 能依據 App 的上下文翻譯 **String Catalog**，加速多語系在地化流程。
在 SwiftUI 中善用 **Text** 的 comment 參數（及 tableName）提供翻譯語境，是讓機器翻譯更準確的關鍵實務。
其他位置可用 **String(localized:)** 與 **LocalizedStringResource** 搭配 comment 標記可在地化字串。
翻譯後需**審閱與迭代**（review and iterate）；XLIFF 會以 state-qualifier="leveraged-mt" 標示**機器翻譯**字串以利辨識。

audience: **需要將 App 在地化為多種語言**、並想用 AI agent 加速翻譯 String Catalog 的開發者。
gloss_en: Translate your app using agents in Xcode
takeaway_en: Use Xcode's coding agents together with your app's context to translate String Catalogs, then review and iterate to produce high-quality localized strings.

points_en.text: **Xcode and coding agents** can translate **String Catalogs** based on your app's context, accelerating multi-language localization.
In SwiftUI, make good use of **Text**'s comment parameter (and tableName) to provide translation context, a key practice for more accurate machine translation.
Elsewhere, use **String(localized:)** and **LocalizedStringResource** with comment to mark localizable strings.
After translating, you need to **review and iterate**; XLIFF marks **machine-translated** strings with state-qualifier="leveraged-mt" to make them easy to identify.

audience_en: Developers who **need to localize their app into multiple languages** and want to use AI agents to speed up translating String Catalogs.

title: Get started with the HTML Model Element
gloss: 開始使用 HTML model 元素
takeaway: 用新的 HTML <model> 元素在網頁直接嵌入可互動的 3D USDZ 內容，支援 iOS、iPadOS、macOS 與 visionOS。

points.text: 新的 HTML **<model>** 元素讓你在網站中直接嵌入可互動的 **3D USDZ** 內容，橫跨 iOS、iPadOS、macOS 與 visionOS。
用 **src** 或 **** 載入模型，並提供 **** 影像備援與 **ready** promise 處理載入成功或失敗。
可透過 **entityTransform** 套用 **DOMMatrix** 自訂旋轉與位移，並以 **stagemode** 控制軌道互動。
支援動畫播放（**playbackRate**、**play**）與 **AR Quick Look**（rel="ar"），讓使用者在現實空間中檢視模型。
未支援瀏覽器可用 **polyfill** 備援，並建議在上線前最佳化 USDZ 資產。

audience: **想在網站中加入 3D 與空間內容的網頁開發者**，特別是要支援 Apple 平台與 Vision Pro 的團隊。
gloss_en: Getting started with the HTML model element
takeaway_en: Use the new HTML <model> element to embed interactive 3D USDZ content directly in web pages, with support for iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS.

points_en.text: The new HTML **<model>** element lets you embed interactive **3D USDZ** content directly in your website, across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS.
Load models with **src** or ****, provide an **** image fallback, and handle load success or failure with the **ready** promise.
Apply custom rotation and translation via **entityTransform** with a **DOMMatrix**, and control orbit interaction with **stagemode**.
Supports animation playback (**playbackRate**, **play**) and **AR Quick Look** (rel="ar"), letting users view models in real space.
Use a **polyfill** as a fallback for unsupported browsers, and optimize your USDZ assets before shipping.

audience_en: **Web developers who want to add 3D and spatial content to their sites**, especially teams targeting Apple platforms and Vision Pro.

title: Create web extensions for Safari
gloss: 為 Safari 建立 Web 擴充功能
takeaway: 從零打造一個 Safari Web 擴充功能，涵蓋 manifest、內容封鎖、修改網頁、儲存資料、打包發佈，並透過 native messaging 與 App 溝通。
chapters: Adding custom UI to your extension
Including the UI in the extension manifest
Wiring up the static declarativeNetRequest rules
Handling adding hosts to the settings
Declaring optional host permissions for all sites
Adding storage permission to the web extension manifest.json
Package your web extension into an app for Xcode

points.text: 可以**不需 Xcode**，直接從 manifest.json 開始建立並測試 Safari Web 擴充功能。
透過 **declarativeNetRequest** 權限可封鎖、修改與重新導向網路請求，並支援動態規則。
使用 **content scripts** 搭配 **scripting** 權限可動態註冊腳本以修改網頁內容。
以 **storage** API 持久化設定，並用 **background script** 在更新時還原狀態。
打包成 App 後可透過 **nativeMessaging** 與原生程式溝通，例如以 LocalAuthentication 做生物辨識驗證。

audience: 適合**想開發或移植 Safari Web 擴充功能的網頁與 App 開發者**，特別是初次接觸者。
gloss_en: Create web extensions for Safari
takeaway_en: Build a Safari web extension from scratch, covering the manifest, content blocking, modifying pages, storing data, packaging for distribution, and communicating with an app via native messaging.

points_en.text: You can build and test Safari web extensions starting straight from manifest.json, **without Xcode**.
The **declarativeNetRequest** permission lets you block, modify, and redirect network requests, with support for dynamic rules.
Use **content scripts** together with the **scripting** permission to dynamically register scripts that modify page content.
Persist settings with the **storage** API, and use a **background script** to restore state on update.
Once packaged into an app, the extension can communicate with native code via **nativeMessaging**, for example using LocalAuthentication for biometric authentication.

audience_en: For **web and app developers who want to build or port Safari web extensions**, especially first-timers.

title: Enhance the accessibility of your reading app
gloss: 強化你閱讀類 App 的無障礙體驗
takeaway: 運用文字導覽 API、連結群組與自訂 UITextInput，為 VoiceOver 與 Speak Screen 打造順暢、可選取且能自動翻頁的閱讀體驗。
chapters: Link text elements together with navigation APIs
Link text elements together with a linked group
Add actions to the editor rotor

points.text: 為 **VoiceOver**、**Speak Screen** 等輔助技術打造穩固的閱讀體驗，提供直覺的文字選取。
用 **accessibilityNextTextNavigationElement**／**accessibilityPreviousTextNavigationElement** 把段落串連，讓導覽依閱讀順序前後移動。
以 **accessibilityLinkedGroup** 在 SwiftUI 中把同一頁的文字元素群組起來。
插入 **causesPageTurn** 特徵並回應 **accessibilityScroll**，朗讀完畢後自動翻頁。
為自訂文字（如掃描頁面）採用 **UITextInput**，讓輔助技術能正確選取與讀取內容。

audience: **開發閱讀、文件或電子書類 App 的 UIKit／SwiftUI 工程師**，想完善無障礙閱讀體驗的人。
gloss_en: Enhance the accessibility of your reading app
takeaway_en: Use text navigation APIs, linked groups, and custom UITextInput to build a smooth, selectable reading experience with automatic page turns for VoiceOver and Speak Screen.

points_en.text: Build robust reading experiences for assistive technologies like **VoiceOver** and **Speak Screen**, with intuitive text selection.
Use **accessibilityNextTextNavigationElement**/**accessibilityPreviousTextNavigationElement** to chain paragraphs so navigation moves forward and backward in reading order.
Use **accessibilityLinkedGroup** in SwiftUI to group the text elements on a single page together.
Add the **causesPageTurn** trait and respond to **accessibilityScroll** to turn the page automatically once reading finishes.
Adopt **UITextInput** for custom text (such as scanned pages) so assistive technologies can correctly select and read the content.

audience_en: **UIKit/SwiftUI engineers building reading, document, or e-book apps** who want to perfect the accessible reading experience.

title: Refine accessibility for custom controls
gloss: 為自訂控制項優化無障礙體驗
takeaway: 為自訂控制項補上 label、value、可調整特性與自訂動作，能讓 VoiceOver 使用者完整操作你的互動元件。
chapters: Customize accessibility for the interactive cat surface

points.text: 用 **accessibilityLabel**、**accessibilityValue** 與 **.adjustable** 特性，搭配 **accessibilityAdjustableAction** 讓滑桿類控制項可被輔助技術調整。
透過 **accessibilityActivationPoint** 設定啟用點，讓 VoiceOver 啟用控制項時落在正確位置。
使用 **AccessibilityNotification.Announcement** 在數值變化時播報，並做好節流避免過度通知。
對複雜控制項以 **accessibilityActions** 提供「上/下/左/右」等自訂動作，取代難以操作的連續手勢。
針對直接觸控的互動表面，用 **accessibilityDirectTouch([.requiresActivation])** 兼顧探索與操作。

audience: 在 SwiftUI 中打造**自訂控制項與互動元件**、想讓它們完整支援 VoiceOver 的開發者。
gloss_en: Refine accessibility for custom controls
takeaway_en: Adding labels, values, adjustable traits, and custom actions to your custom controls lets VoiceOver users fully operate your interactive elements.

points_en.text: Use **accessibilityLabel**, **accessibilityValue**, and the **.adjustable** trait together with **accessibilityAdjustableAction** so slider-style controls can be adjusted by assistive technologies.
Set an activation point with **accessibilityActivationPoint** so VoiceOver activates the control at the correct location.
Use **AccessibilityNotification.Announcement** to announce value changes, and throttle them to avoid excessive notifications.
For complex controls, provide custom actions like up/down/left/right via **accessibilityActions** instead of hard-to-perform continuous gestures.
For direct-touch interactive surfaces, use **accessibilityDirectTouch([.requiresActivation])** to balance exploration and operation.

audience_en: Developers building **custom controls and interactive elements** in SwiftUI who want full VoiceOver support.

title: Prepare your tvOS apps for Dynamic Type
gloss: 讓你的 tvOS App 支援動態字型
takeaway: tvOS 也要支援 Dynamic Type,改用標準 text styles 與彈性 constraints,並在進入無障礙字級時切換成適配版面。
chapters: Dynamic Type with text styles in UIKit
Adapt layout in response to dynamic type
Provide a conditional layout for when larger sizes are turned on
UIKit adaptive layout that responds to content size changes

points.text: **Dynamic Type** 讓使用者自選文字大小,tvOS App 也應支援以提升閱讀與操作舒適度。
常見問題來自**寫死的字體大小與固定寬度 frame**;改用 .frame(maxWidth: .infinity) 等彈性 constraints。
採用**標準 text styles**:SwiftUI 用 .font(.caption) 等,UIKit 用 UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle:) 並開啟 adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory。
在 SwiftUI 監看 **@Environment(\.dynamicTypeSize)**,用 isAccessibilitySize 調整 containerRelativeFrame 的欄數或以 AnyLayout 切換 H/V Stack。
UIKit 用 **registerForTraitChanges** 監聽 UITraitPreferredContentSizeCategory,在無障礙字級時把 stack 軸向改為垂直。

audience: **開發 tvOS App、想兼顧無障礙與不同字級下版面正確性的開發者。**
gloss_en: Prepare your tvOS app for Dynamic Type
takeaway_en: tvOS apps should support Dynamic Type too—switch to standard text styles and flexible constraints, and adapt the layout when accessibility text sizes are in use.

points_en.text: **Dynamic Type** lets users choose their text size, and tvOS apps should support it to make reading and interaction more comfortable.
Common problems come from **hard-coded font sizes and fixed-width frames**; switch to flexible constraints like .frame(maxWidth: .infinity).
Adopt **standard text styles**: in SwiftUI use .font(.caption) and the like; in UIKit use UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle:) and enable adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory.
In SwiftUI, observe **@Environment(\.dynamicTypeSize)** and use isAccessibilitySize to adjust the column count in containerRelativeFrame, or switch between H/V Stacks with AnyLayout.
In UIKit, use **registerForTraitChanges** to observe UITraitPreferredContentSizeCategory and switch the stack axis to vertical at accessibility text sizes.

audience_en: **Developers building tvOS apps who want correct layouts across text sizes while supporting accessibility.**

title: Meet the new MetricKit
gloss: 認識全新的 MetricKit
takeaway: 用全新以 async 串流為核心的 MetricKit 接收效能指標與診斷資料，並透過 State Reporting 加上自訂情境，更快找出並修正效能問題。
chapters: Send your metrics to the server
Send your diagnostic data to the server
Send encoded metric reports to the server

points.text: 用 `MetricManager` 的 **async 串流**（`metricReports`、`diagnosticReports`）接收效能指標與診斷，取代舊有的 delegate 模式。
指標報告可直接以 **`JSONEncoder` 編碼**並上傳到自家伺服器，方便集中分析。
診斷資料涵蓋**當機（crash）與卡頓（hang）**，並提供 `callStackTree`、終止原因與分類等細節。
透過 **State Reporting**（`StateReporter`、`@ReportableMetadata`）為指標加上自訂情境，把資料對應到 App 內的狀態與畫面。

audience: **重視 App 效能、想建立指標與當機監控管線的開發者**。
gloss_en: Meet the new MetricKit
takeaway_en: Receive performance metrics and diagnostics with the new async-stream-based MetricKit, and use State Reporting to add custom context so you can find and fix performance problems faster.

points_en.text: Receive performance metrics and diagnostics via `MetricManager`'s **async streams** (`metricReports`, `diagnosticReports`), replacing the old delegate pattern.
Metric reports can be encoded directly with **`JSONEncoder`** and uploaded to your own server for centralized analysis.
Diagnostics cover **crashes and hangs**, with details like `callStackTree`, termination reason, and classification.
Use **State Reporting** (`StateReporter`, `@ReportableMetadata`) to attach custom context to metrics, mapping data to in-app states and screens.

audience_en: **Developers who care about app performance and want to build a metrics and crash monitoring pipeline**.

title: Live Activities essentials
gloss: Live Activities 核心要點
takeaway: 用 ActivityKit 從零打造、更新並最佳化 **Live Activity**，涵蓋 Dynamic Island、StandBy、新的 small 樣式與 App Intents 互動。
chapters: Start and update a Live Activity
Optimize for limited width in the Dynamic Island
Associate an intent with a button

points.text: 以 `ActivityAttributes` 與 `ContentState` 定義資料，並用 `ActivityConfiguration` 與 **Dynamic Island** 各區域建立 Live Activity 視圖。
透過 `Activity.request` 啟動、`activity.update` 更新內容，先以 `ActivityAuthorizationInfo` 確認已啟用。
新增對 **`activityFamily` small** 樣式的支援（`supplementalActivityFamilies([.small])`），可依 `activityFamily` 環境值客製化呈現。
用 `isDynamicIslandLimitedInWidth` 與 `showsWidgetContainerBackground` 等環境值，最佳化 Dynamic Island 窄版與 **StandBy** 背景。
以 `LiveActivityIntent` 加入互動，將 intent 綁定到 `Button(intent:)` 直接在 Live Activity 上操作。

audience: **想加入或精進 Live Activity 與 Dynamic Island** 的 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Live Activities essentials
takeaway_en: Build, update, and optimize a **Live Activity** from scratch with ActivityKit, covering Dynamic Island, StandBy, the new small style, and App Intents interaction.

points_en.text: Define data with `ActivityAttributes` and `ContentState`, and build the Live Activity views with `ActivityConfiguration` and the **Dynamic Island** regions.
Start with `Activity.request` and update content with `activity.update`, after confirming it's enabled via `ActivityAuthorizationInfo`.
Adds support for the **`activityFamily` small** style (`supplementalActivityFamilies([.small])`), letting you customize presentation based on the `activityFamily` environment value.
Use environment values like `isDynamicIslandLimitedInWidth` and `showsWidgetContainerBackground` to optimize the narrow Dynamic Island and the **StandBy** background.
Add interactivity with `LiveActivityIntent`, binding the intent to `Button(intent:)` to act directly on the Live Activity.

audience_en: iOS developers **looking to add or refine Live Activities and Dynamic Island**.

title: Expand the capabilities of your Virtualization app
gloss: 擴充你的 Virtualization App 能力
takeaway: 在 macOS 27 中透過自動化佈建、USB 存取、自訂網路與 DiskImageKit 大幅擴充虛擬機的能力。
chapters: Attach a delegate to a VZCustomVirtioDevice

points.text: 使用 **VZMacGuestProvisioningOptions** 自動完成 macOS guest 的使用者設定與自動登入佈建。
透過 **AccessoryAccess** 與 **VZUSBPassthroughDevice** 讓虛擬機回應並直通 USB 配件。
以 **vmnet** API 建立自訂網路拓撲，並用 VZVmnetNetworkDeviceAttachment 接上虛擬機。
新的 **DiskImageKit** 支援以分層（base/cache/overlay）方式組合磁碟映像檔。
可透過 **VZCustomVirtioDevice** 自訂 Virtio 裝置並處理其佇列元素。

audience: 在 macOS 上開發 **虛擬化或 VM 管理工具** 並想採用 macOS 27 新能力的開發者。
gloss_en: Expand the capabilities of your Virtualization app
takeaway_en: In macOS 27, greatly expand your VM's capabilities through automated provisioning, USB access, custom networking, and DiskImageKit.

points_en.text: Use **VZMacGuestProvisioningOptions** to automate user setup and auto-login provisioning for a macOS guest.
Let VMs respond to and pass through USB accessories via **AccessoryAccess** and **VZUSBPassthroughDevice**.
Build custom network topologies with the **vmnet** API and attach them to a VM using VZVmnetNetworkDeviceAttachment.
The new **DiskImageKit** supports composing disk images in layers (base/cache/overlay).
Customize Virtio devices and handle their queue elements with **VZCustomVirtioDevice**.

audience_en: Developers building **virtualization or VM management tools** on macOS who want to adopt the new macOS 27 capabilities.

title: Create live communication experiences
gloss: 打造即時通訊體驗
takeaway: 用 LiveCommunicationKit 的 ConversationManager 與動作委派模型，將即時通話整合進系統體驗，並支援來電、去電、群組與合併等場景。
chapters: Report the incoming conversation to the system

points.text: **LiveCommunicationKit** 透過 **ConversationManager** 與其 Configuration（鈴聲、圖示、視訊支援、handle 類型等）把即時通訊整合進系統。
來電以 **PushKit** 收到 VoIP 推播後，呼叫 **reportNewIncomingConversation** 回報系統，再於 delegate 處理 **JoinConversationAction**。
去電建立 **StartConversationAction** 並以 manager.perform 執行；通話狀態用 **reportConversationEvent** 回報連線進度。
支援**群組通話**：以 Conversation.Update 回報成員變動，並處理 **MergeConversationAction** 合併多通對話。

audience: **開發 VoIP、視訊或語音通話 App** 並希望深度整合系統來電 UI 與群組通話的工程師。
gloss_en: Build live communication experiences
takeaway_en: Use LiveCommunicationKit's ConversationManager and action delegate model to integrate real-time calls into the system experience, with support for incoming, outgoing, group, and merged call scenarios.

points_en.text: **LiveCommunicationKit** integrates real-time communication into the system through **ConversationManager** and its Configuration (ringtone, icon, video support, handle types, and more).
For incoming calls, after receiving a VoIP push via **PushKit**, call **reportNewIncomingConversation** to report it to the system, then handle the **JoinConversationAction** in the delegate.
For outgoing calls, create a **StartConversationAction** and execute it with manager.perform; report connection progress with **reportConversationEvent**.
Supports **group calls**: report membership changes with Conversation.Update and handle **MergeConversationAction** to merge multiple conversations.

audience_en: Engineers **building VoIP, video, or voice calling apps** who want deep integration with the system call UI and group calling.

title: Create UI prototypes using agents in Xcode
gloss: 在 Xcode 用代理人打造 UI 原型
takeaway: 善用 Xcode 內的 AI 代理人快速探索 UI 可能性、迭代版面，並打磨關鍵互動時刻，加速原型製作。
chapters: Making your app feel lived in

points.text: 示範如何在 **Xcode** 用 **AI 代理人（agents）**為 App 製作原型，快速嘗試互動與版面。
藉代理人**探索 UI 的多種可能性**，在動手寫死實作前先比較不同設計方向。
透過填入擬真內容讓 App「**感覺像真的在使用**」（feel lived in），原型更貼近真實情境。
聚焦**調校關鍵時刻（tuning key moments）**，打磨動畫與互動細節提升質感。

audience: **想用 AI 加速 UI 原型與設計迭代**的 iOS 開發者與設計師。
gloss_en: Prototype UI with agents in Xcode
takeaway_en: Use AI agents in Xcode to quickly explore UI possibilities, iterate on layouts, and polish key interaction moments, accelerating prototyping.

points_en.text: Demonstrates how to prototype your app in **Xcode** with **AI agents**, quickly trying out interactions and layouts.
Use agents to **explore multiple UI possibilities**, comparing different design directions before committing to a hardcoded implementation.
Make the app **feel lived in** by populating it with realistic content, so prototypes more closely match real scenarios.
Focus on **tuning key moments**, polishing animation and interaction details to raise the quality.

audience_en: iOS developers and designers who want to **use AI to accelerate UI prototyping and design iteration**.

title: What’s new in assessment on macOS
gloss: macOS 評量功能的新變化
takeaway: 透過 Automatic Assessment Configuration 框架的新選項，可在 macOS 上為教育 App 設定前置檢查、無障礙限制與系統體驗，打造安全的考試環境。

points.text: 以 **precondition checks** 在進入評量前要求 SIP、受管理裝置、單一使用者等條件，確保環境安全。
可精細控制 **accessibility restrictions**，個別允許或停用 VoiceOver、Switch Control、Zoom 等無障礙功能。
透過 **system experience customization** 自訂 Menu Bar 項目、輸入限制（聽寫、自動填寫、Emoji 鍵盤）與 Dock 外觀。
可設定允許存取的目錄檔案，並以 **application launch restrictions** 限制可啟動的程式與腳本執行。

audience: 適合**開發教育與考試類 App、需在 macOS 上提供安全評量環境的開發者**。
gloss_en: What's new in assessment on macOS
takeaway_en: New options in the Automatic Assessment Configuration framework let you set up precondition checks, accessibility restrictions, and the system experience for education apps on macOS to create a secure testing environment.

points_en.text: Use **precondition checks** to require conditions such as SIP, a managed device, or a single user before entering assessment, ensuring a secure environment.
Fine-tune **accessibility restrictions** to individually allow or disable assistive features like VoiceOver, Switch Control, and Zoom.
Use **system experience customization** to customize Menu Bar items, input restrictions (Dictation, autofill, Emoji keyboard), and the Dock's appearance.
Configure which directories and files can be accessed, and use **application launch restrictions** to limit which apps can launch and which scripts can run.

audience_en: For **developers building education and exam apps who need to provide a secure assessment environment on macOS**.

title: Run local agentic AI on the Mac using MLX
gloss: 用 MLX 在 Mac 上執行本機 agentic AI
takeaway: 在 Mac 上以 MLX-LM 啟動本機 OpenAI 相容伺服器，讓 AI agent 兼顧隱私、低延遲與離線運作，並可透過分散式推論擴展更大模型。
chapters: Set up MLX-LM and start the local server
Configure an agent to use your local MLX server

points.text: 在本機執行 AI agent，兼顧**隱私、低延遲與離線存取**，由 MLX 進展與 Mac 硬體共同支撐。
用 **mlx_lm.server** 啟動本機伺服器，提供與 **OpenAI 相容**的 `/v1/chat/completions` 端點。
把 agent（例如 **opencode**）的 baseURL 指向 `http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1` 即可改用本機模型。
說明如何**讓 agent 變快**，並透過並行處理提升吞吐。
以 **mlx.launch** 搭配 hostfile 與 jaccl backend 進行**分散式推論**，跑更大的模型。

audience: **想在 Mac 上自建本機 LLM／agent 服務的開發者與 ML 工程師**，重視隱私與離線運作的人。
gloss_en: Run local agentic AI on the Mac using MLX
takeaway_en: Launch a local OpenAI-compatible server with MLX-LM on the Mac so AI agents get privacy, low latency, and offline operation, and scale to larger models with distributed inference.

points_en.text: Run AI agents locally with **privacy, low latency, and offline access**, backed by MLX advances and Mac hardware.
Use **mlx_lm.server** to launch a local server that exposes an **OpenAI-compatible** `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint.
Point an agent's (for example, **opencode**) baseURL at `http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1` to switch to the local model.
Explains how to **make your agent faster** and increase throughput through concurrency.
Run **distributed inference** with **mlx.launch** plus a hostfile and the jaccl backend to run larger models.

audience_en: **Developers and ML engineers who want to self-host a local LLM/agent service on the Mac** and care about privacy and offline operation.

title: Explore distributed inference and training with MLX
gloss: 用 MLX 探索分散式推論與訓練

chapters: Hostfile format for a 4-node MLX cluster
Generate the cluster hostfile with mlx.distributed_config
Run distributed LLM inference with mlx_lm.chat
Run distributed inference with pipeline parallelism
CLI, Python, Swift, and C++ APIs
Distributed inference with the MLX LM Python API
Shard a layer with the MLX Python API
All-reduce across devices in Python, Swift, and C++
Standalone distributed sum with the JACCL C++ API

points.text: 用 **mlx.distributed_config** 產生叢集 hostfile，並透過 **jaccl** 後端與 **RDMA** 達成高效節點互連。
以 **mlx.launch** 搭配 **mlx_lm.chat** 在多台 Mac 上跑分散式 LLM 推論，執行單機放不下的大模型。
支援兩種模型平行策略：預設的**張量平行（tensor parallelism）**與加上 `--pipeline` 的**管線平行（pipeline parallelism）**。
用 **mlx_lm.lora** 做分散式微調，並依裝置數放大 `--batch-size`。
提供 **CLI、Python、Swift 與 C++** 多語言 API，包含 **all_sum** 等集合通訊與 **sharded_load** 分片載入。

audience: 想在**多台 Mac 上擴展大型模型推論與微調**、熟悉 MLX 的機器學習工程師。
gloss_en: Explore distributed inference and training with MLX
takeaway_en: Use MLX to distribute inference and fine-tuning across multiple Macs, running large models that won't fit on a single machine.

points_en.text: Use **mlx.distributed_config** to generate a cluster hostfile, and achieve efficient node interconnect through the **jaccl** backend and **RDMA**.
Use **mlx.launch** with **mlx_lm.chat** to run distributed LLM inference across multiple Macs, running large models that won't fit on a single machine.
Supports two model-parallel strategies: the default **tensor parallelism** and **pipeline parallelism** with `--pipeline`.
Use **mlx_lm.lora** for distributed fine-tuning, scaling up `--batch-size` according to the number of devices.
Provides multi-language APIs across **CLI, Python, Swift, and C++**, including collective communication like **all_sum** and sharded loading via **sharded_load**.

audience_en: Machine learning engineers familiar with MLX who want to **scale large-model inference and fine-tuning across multiple Macs**.

title: Design immersive environments for visionOS apps and the spatial web
gloss: 為 visionOS App 與空間網頁設計沉浸式環境
takeaway: 用前期、製作、後期三階段的工作流,為 visionOS App、網站與 SharePlay 體驗打造擬真的沉浸式環境。

points.text: 教你為 App、網站與 **SharePlay** 體驗打造**擬真(photoreal)的 visionOS 環境**。
**Pre-production(前期)**:規劃環境概念、參考與設計方向。
**Production(製作)**:實際建構環境資產與場景。
**Post-production(後期)**:潤飾與最佳化沉浸式呈現效果。
內容同時涵蓋 App 與**空間網頁(spatial web)**的沉浸式環境設計。

audience: **為 visionOS 或空間網頁打造沉浸式環境的設計師與 3D 內容創作者。**
gloss_en: Design immersive environments for visionOS apps and the spatial web
takeaway_en: Use a three-phase workflow—pre-production, production, and post-production—to build photoreal immersive environments for visionOS apps, websites, and SharePlay experiences.

points_en.text: Learn to build **photoreal visionOS environments** for apps, websites, and **SharePlay** experiences.
**Pre-production**: plan the environment concept, references, and design direction.
**Production**: actually build the environment assets and scene.
**Post-production**: polish and optimize the immersive presentation.
The content covers immersive environment design for both apps and the **spatial web**.

audience_en: **Designers and 3D content creators building immersive environments for visionOS or the spatial web.**

title: What’s new in image understanding
gloss: 影像理解的新功能
takeaway: 用 Vision 的 tap-to-segment 以點選方式分割影像，並把影像當作輸入餵給 Foundation Models 產生說明或進行 image-based tool calling。
chapters: Generate an image caption with Foundation Models
Create a crop that highlights a prominent subject (watchOS / saliency)

points.text: 用 **tap-to-segment**（`GenerateIterativeSegmentationRequest`）以種子點產生物件遮罩，並可加點逐步修正結果。
**Foundation Models** 現可接收影像輸入，透過 `Prompt` 搭配 `Attachment(image)` 直接產生影像說明文字。
支援 **image-based tool calling**：自訂 `Tool` 以 `ImageReference` 解析影像，讓模型呼叫如植物辨識等工具。
Vision 現可在 **watchOS** 使用，並以 `GenerateObjectnessBasedSaliencyImageRequest` 依顯著主體自動裁切影像。

audience: **想在 App 中加入影像分割、影像理解或多模態模型功能的開發者**。
gloss_en: What's new in image understanding
takeaway_en: Segment images by tapping with Vision's tap-to-segment, and feed images as input to Foundation Models to generate captions or perform image-based tool calling.

points_en.text: Use **tap-to-segment** (`GenerateIterativeSegmentationRequest`) to produce object masks from seed points, refining the result step by step by adding more points.
**Foundation Models** can now accept image input, generating image captions directly via a `Prompt` paired with `Attachment(image)`.
Support **image-based tool calling**: define a custom `Tool` that resolves images via `ImageReference`, letting the model call tools such as plant identification.
Vision is now available on **watchOS**, and `GenerateObjectnessBasedSaliencyImageRequest` can automatically crop images based on their salient subject.

audience_en: **Developers who want to add image segmentation, image understanding, or multimodal model features to their app**.

title: Build intelligent Siri experiences with App Schemas
gloss: 用 App Schemas 打造智慧 Siri 體驗
takeaway: 用 **App Intents 與 App Schemas** 把 App 的內容與動作交給 Siri 與 Apple Intelligence，並支援跨 App 的螢幕感知與內容傳遞。
chapters: Contributing message content to Apple Intelligence
An interface that locates entities using arbitrary string input
Adopting a schema domain in UnicornChat
Working across apps - Exporting content to another app

points.text: 用 **App Entities** 建模資料、`IndexedEntity` 建立索引，讓 Siri 與 Apple Intelligence 能存取你的內容。
採用 **App Schemas** 領域（如 `.messages.message`）即可獲得系統內建的智慧能力，無需自行設計介面。
以 `EntityStringQuery` 用任意字串解析實體，並透過 `#Predicate` 與 SwiftData 查詢比對。
跨 App 運作：用 `appEntityIdentifier` 做**螢幕感知（onscreen awareness）**與視圖註記，讓 Siri 知道畫面上有什麼。
透過 `IntentValueQuery` 與 `IntentValueRepresentation`（搭配 `Transferable`）在 App 之間匯出與匯入內容。

audience: **想讓 App 內容與動作深度整合進 Siri 與 Apple Intelligence** 的 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Build intelligent Siri experiences with App Schemas
takeaway_en: Use **App Intents and App Schemas** to hand your app's content and actions to Siri and Apple Intelligence, with support for cross-app onscreen awareness and content transfer.

points_en.text: Model your data with **App Entities** and index it with `IndexedEntity` so Siri and Apple Intelligence can access your content.
Adopt an **App Schemas** domain (such as `.messages.message`) to gain the system's built-in intelligence without designing the interface yourself.
Resolve entities from arbitrary strings with `EntityStringQuery`, matching via `#Predicate` and SwiftData queries.
Works across apps: use `appEntityIdentifier` for **onscreen awareness** and view annotation, so Siri knows what's on screen.
Export and import content between apps with `IntentValueQuery` and `IntentValueRepresentation` (paired with `Transferable`).

audience_en: iOS developers **who want to deeply integrate their app's content and actions into Siri and Apple Intelligence**.

title: What’s new in the Foundation Models framework
gloss: Foundation Models 框架的新功能
takeaway: Foundation Models framework 新增影像理解、Private Cloud Compute、第三方模型整合與 Dynamic Profiles，打造更強大的 agentic App。
chapters: Routing between craft analysis and brainstorm
Describing the profile for craft app
Describing the profile for craft app

points.text: 新的 **on-device 模型** 提供更大的 context size，並可用 **tokenCount** 預估輸入長度。
支援 **影像理解（Vision）**，可在 respond 中透過 **Attachment** 附加 UIImage 等影像類型發問。
可存取 **Private Cloud Compute**，並透過模型抽象層整合第三方與開源模型。
以 **DynamicProfile** 為 agentic App 動態組合 instructions、tools 與模型設定，並支援模式切換。
提供 **fm 命令列工具**、Evaluations framework 與 **Foundation Models Python SDK** 等開發配套。

audience: 想在 App 中加入 **裝置端生成式 AI 與 agentic 功能** 的 Apple 平台開發者。
gloss_en: What's new in the Foundation Models framework
takeaway_en: The Foundation Models framework adds image understanding, Private Cloud Compute, third-party model integration, and Dynamic Profiles to build more powerful agentic apps.

points_en.text: The new **on-device model** offers a larger context size, and you can estimate input length with **tokenCount**.
Supports **image understanding (Vision)**: attach images such as UIImage via an **Attachment** in respond to ask questions about them.
Access **Private Cloud Compute**, and integrate third-party and open source models through a model abstraction layer.
Use **DynamicProfile** to dynamically compose instructions, tools, and model settings for agentic apps, with support for mode switching.
Ships developer tooling including the **fm command-line tool**, the Evaluations framework, and the **Foundation Models Python SDK**.

audience_en: Apple platform developers who want to add **on-device generative AI and agentic features** to their apps.

title: Build agentic app experiences with the Foundation Models framework
gloss: 用 Foundation Models 框架打造 agentic App 體驗
takeaway: 透過 DynamicProfile、動態指令、transcript 管理與多 agent 編排（baton-pass、phone-a-friend、skills），用 Foundation Models 打造可隨階段切換模型與行為的 agentic 體驗。
chapters: Initialize your session with your dynamic profile
Read and write session properties in a profile
Define a tool that throws an error
Set the transcript error handling policy

points.text: 新的 **DynamicProfile** 與 **DynamicInstructions** 能依 App 階段動態切換**指令、模型（on-device 或 PCC）、溫度與推理層級**。
提供 **historyTransform**、rollingWindow、lifecycle modifiers 與 **@SessionProperty** 來管理 transcript 歷史與自訂工作階段狀態。
多 agent 編排模式：**baton-pass**（交棒切換模式）、**phone-a-friend**（委派子 session）與 **Skills**（依需求注入知識）。
可用 **toolCallingMode**（.required/.disallowed）控制工具呼叫並跳出迴圈，並以 **transcriptErrorHandlingPolicy** 決定錯誤後保留或還原 transcript。
最後涵蓋 **效能、準確度與評估**（evaluations），協助衡量 agentic 流程的品質。

audience: **已熟悉 Foundation Models 基礎、想進一步打造多階段 agentic 流程**的進階 AI 功能開發者。
gloss_en: Build agentic app experiences with Foundation Models
takeaway_en: Use DynamicProfile, dynamic instructions, transcript management, and multi-agent orchestration (baton-pass, phone-a-friend, skills) to build agentic experiences with Foundation Models that switch models and behavior by stage.

points_en.text: The new **DynamicProfile** and **DynamicInstructions** let you dynamically switch **instructions, model (on-device or PCC), temperature, and reasoning level** based on your app's stage.
Provides **historyTransform**, rollingWindow, lifecycle modifiers, and **@SessionProperty** to manage transcript history and customize session state.
Multi-agent orchestration patterns: **baton-pass** (handing off between modes), **phone-a-friend** (delegating to a sub-session), and **Skills** (injecting knowledge on demand).
Use **toolCallingMode** (.required/.disallowed) to control tool calls and break out of loops, and **transcriptErrorHandlingPolicy** to decide whether to keep or restore the transcript after an error.
Finally covers **performance, accuracy, and evaluations** to help you measure the quality of your agentic flows.

audience_en: Advanced AI feature developers who **already know the Foundation Models basics and want to build multi-stage agentic flows**.

title: Debug and profile agentic app experiences with Instruments
gloss: 用 Instruments 除錯與分析代理式 App 體驗
takeaway: 用 Xcode 強化版的 FoundationModels instrument 錄製追蹤、檢視代理流程行為並最佳化其效能。
chapters: Inspect and diagnose an agentic experience

points.text: 使用 Xcode 中強化的 **FoundationModels instrument**，檢視並診斷**代理式（agentic）流程**的行為與效能。
建立適合 **LLM App 開發的心態**，理解非確定性流程需要不同的觀察與除錯方式。
用 **Instruments** 錄製追蹤（trace），並透過其 UI 逐步檢視代理執行的每個環節。
解讀**效能指標（performance metrics）**，找出延遲與瓶頸並加以最佳化。

audience: **正在用 Foundation Models 打造代理式或 LLM 功能**、需要除錯與最佳化效能的開發者。
gloss_en: Debug and profile agentic app experiences with Instruments
takeaway_en: Use Xcode's enhanced FoundationModels instrument to record traces, inspect agentic flow behavior, and optimize its performance.

points_en.text: Use the enhanced **FoundationModels instrument** in Xcode to inspect and diagnose the behavior and performance of **agentic flows**.
Build the right **mindset for LLM app development**, understanding that non-deterministic flows need a different approach to observation and debugging.
Record a trace with **Instruments** and step through every part of the agent's execution in its UI.
Interpret **performance metrics** to find latency and bottlenecks and optimize them.

audience_en: Developers **building agentic or LLM features with Foundation Models** who need to debug and optimize performance.

title: LLM search using Core Spotlight
gloss: 使用 Core Spotlight 的 LLM 搜尋
takeaway: 結合 SpotlightSearchTool 與 LanguageModelSession，可把基本搜尋升級為以 App 索引為依據的檢索增強（RAG）系統。
chapters: Ask the model with a Foundation Models session
Provide full items with an index delegate
Track the query token for refresh
Reference resolution with a contact resolver
Define an evaluation dataset with ModelSampleProtocol

points.text: 把 **SpotlightSearchTool** 加入 **LanguageModelSession** 的 tools，即可讓模型以 App 的 Core Spotlight 索引為依據回答問題。
透過 **CSSearchableIndexDelegate** 提供完整項目，並追蹤 query token 來刷新逐步顯示的結果。
用 **GuidanceProfile** 調整搜尋導引層級，裝置端模型 context 較小時宜採用 focused 導引。
可實作 **ContactResolver** 做指代解析，並以 **CustomStage** 自訂搜尋管線階段。
使用 **Evaluations** 框架與 **ModelSampleProtocol**、**TrajectoryExpectation** 建立資料集，量化評估回應品質。

audience: 適合**想在 App 中以裝置端模型打造 RAG 搜尋體驗、並善用 Spotlight 索引的開發者**。
gloss_en: LLM search using Core Spotlight
takeaway_en: Combining SpotlightSearchTool with LanguageModelSession lets you upgrade basic search into a retrieval-augmented (RAG) system grounded in your app's index.

points_en.text: Add **SpotlightSearchTool** to a **LanguageModelSession**'s tools so the model can answer questions grounded in your app's Core Spotlight index.
Provide full items via **CSSearchableIndexDelegate**, and track the query token to refresh results as they're shown incrementally.
Use **GuidanceProfile** to tune the search guidance level; favor focused guidance when the on-device model's context is small.
Implement a **ContactResolver** for reference resolution, and use **CustomStage** to customize stages of the search pipeline.
Use the **Evaluations** framework with **ModelSampleProtocol** and **TrajectoryExpectation** to build datasets and quantitatively assess response quality.

audience_en: For **developers who want to build a RAG search experience in their app using on-device models and make good use of the Spotlight index**.

title: Principles of great design
gloss: 卓越設計的原則
takeaway: 以目的、能動性、責任、熟悉感、彈性、簡潔、工藝與愉悅這幾項基本原則，作為打造優秀 Apple 平台體驗的設計準則。

points.text: 深入探討 Apple 平台的**基本設計原則**，建立判斷好設計的共同語言。
從**目的（Purpose）與能動性（Agency）**出發，讓設計服務使用者的意圖。
強調**責任（Responsibility）、熟悉感（Familiarity）與彈性（Flexibility）**，兼顧信任與適應力。
以**簡潔（Simplicity）、工藝（Craft）與愉悅（Delight）**收尾，追求細節品質與情感體驗。

audience: **設計師與在意產品體驗的開發者**，想建立紮實設計判斷力的人。
gloss_en: Principles of great design
takeaway_en: Use the fundamental principles of purpose, agency, responsibility, familiarity, flexibility, simplicity, craft, and delight as the design guidelines for building great Apple platform experiences.

points_en.text: Dive deep into the **fundamental design principles** for Apple platforms, building a shared language for judging good design.
Start from **purpose and agency** so design serves the user's intent.
Emphasize **responsibility, familiarity, and flexibility**, balancing trust and adaptability.
Close with **simplicity, craft, and delight**, pursuing detail quality and emotional experience.

audience_en: **Designers and developers who care about product experience** and want to build solid design judgment.

title: Communicate your brand identity on iOS
gloss: 在 iOS 上傳達品牌識別
takeaway: 用字體、色彩、元件與互動表達品牌個性，同時保留 iOS 使用者熟悉的操作慣性。

points.text: 在**元件（Components）**層面客製外觀時，仍要維持系統行為與使用者的操作預期。
透過**內容（Content）**呈現語氣與個性，是傳達品牌的重要一環。
善用**色彩（Color）與字體（Typography）**建立一致而獨特的視覺識別。
以**圖示（Iconography）**強化品牌印象，在熟悉與獨特之間取得平衡。

audience: 想在 iOS 上**強化品牌識別、又不犧牲系統一致性**的設計師與開發者。
gloss_en: Communicate your brand identity on iOS
takeaway_en: Express your brand's personality through typography, color, components, and interactions while preserving the operating conventions iOS users are familiar with.

points_en.text: When customizing the look of **Components**, still maintain system behavior and users' operating expectations.
Conveying tone and personality through **Content** is an important part of expressing your brand.
Make good use of **Color and Typography** to build a consistent yet distinctive visual identity.
Reinforce brand impression with **Iconography**, striking a balance between the familiar and the unique.

audience_en: Designers and developers who want to **strengthen brand identity on iOS without sacrificing system consistency**.

title: Design no-code games with Reality Composer Pro 3
gloss: 用 Reality Composer Pro 3 設計無程式碼遊戲
takeaway: 用 Reality Composer Pro 3 的 ScriptGraph 不寫程式就能做出 3D 互動內容與遊戲,必要時再用程式碼接收事件做進階整合。

points.text: **ScriptGraph** 讓你在 Reality Composer Pro 3 裡用**節點視覺化、不寫程式**就能建立 3D 互動內容與遊戲。
課程以實作示範**從零打造一款遊戲**的完整流程。
「Advanced techniques」展示進階用法,讓 no-code 內容也能更靈活。
可用程式碼透過 **scene.subscribe(forEventName:)** 接收 ScriptGraph 發出的自訂事件(如 "squirrelTalk")。
事件可搭配 RealityView 的 **Attachment** 把 SwiftUI 視圖綁到 3D 內容上呈現。

audience: **想用 Reality Composer Pro 3 製作 3D 遊戲或互動內容、但不想寫大量程式的設計師與創作者。**
gloss_en: Design no-code games with Reality Composer Pro 3
takeaway_en: Use ScriptGraph in Reality Composer Pro 3 to build interactive 3D content and games without writing code, then drop into code to receive events for advanced integration when needed.

points_en.text: **ScriptGraph** lets you build interactive 3D content and games in Reality Composer Pro 3 **visually with nodes, no code required**.
The session walks through the complete process of **building a game from scratch** with a hands-on demo.
The "Advanced techniques" section shows advanced usage that makes no-code content even more flexible.
From code, receive custom events emitted by ScriptGraph (such as "squirrelTalk") via **scene.subscribe(forEventName:)**.
Events can pair with RealityView's **Attachment** to bind SwiftUI views onto 3D content for presentation.

audience_en: **Designers and creators who want to build 3D games or interactive content with Reality Composer Pro 3 without writing much code.**

title: Meet the Music Understanding framework
gloss: 認識 Music Understanding 框架
takeaway: 用全新的 Music Understanding 框架在裝置端分析音訊的六個面向（調性、節奏、結構、樂器、響度、節奏感），打造音樂相關的智慧功能。

points.text: 全新的 **Music Understanding** 框架可在**裝置端（on device）**分析音訊的六個面向：調性、節奏、結構、樂器活動、響度與節奏感。
用 `MusicUnderstandingSession` 載入 `AVURLAsset` 後呼叫 `analyze()`，結果集中在 `SessionResult`，並以 `TimedValue` 與 `RangedValue` 標註時間點與時間範圍。
調性分析提供 `KeySignature`（`Tonic`、`Mode`），節奏分析提供 beats、bars 與 `beatsPerMinute`。
提供 **串流 API**（如 `loudnessResults`）與自訂 `AudioProvider`，可即時逐段取得分析結果並更新 UI。

audience: **開發音樂、健身、影音剪輯或任何需要分析音訊內容 App 的開發者**。
gloss_en: Meet the Music Understanding framework
takeaway_en: Use the new Music Understanding framework to analyze audio on device across six dimensions (key, rhythm, structure, instrumentation, loudness, and groove) to build smart music features.

points_en.text: The new **Music Understanding** framework analyzes audio **on device** across six dimensions: key, rhythm, structure, instrument activity, loudness, and groove.
Load an `AVURLAsset` with `MusicUnderstandingSession` and call `analyze()`; results are gathered in `SessionResult`, with `TimedValue` and `RangedValue` annotating points and ranges in time.
Key analysis provides `KeySignature` (`Tonic`, `Mode`), and rhythm analysis provides beats, bars, and `beatsPerMinute`.

title: What's new in Swift
gloss: Swift 有什麼新東西
takeaway: 語言層大豐收——日常 ergonomics(anyAppleOS、@diagnose、module selector ::)、並行與記憶體安全、@specialized / @inline 等效能控制,跨平台(C / Java / Wasm / Embedded)也大推進。

points.text: 日常語法:**@available(anyAppleOS 27, *)** 一行取代列舉所有 OS;**@diagnose** 精準控制個別警告(ignored / warning / error);**module selector Module::Symbol** 解決跨模組同名衝突;memberwise init 會依存取層級產生多個版本。
並行:更好的診斷與 Sendable 推斷(**~Sendable、@unchecked Sendable**);**withTaskCancellationShield** 保護不可中斷的關鍵區段。
標準庫:新 **FilePath** 型別、**Dictionary.mapKeyedValues**、init(uniqueKeysWithValues:)。
Swift Testing 同步更新:**Issue severity(.warning)**、Test.cancel、**雙向 XCTest 互通**(呼應 267)。

效能與記憶體:**@inline(always/never)、@specialized(where:)** 直接控制最佳化;**InlineArray** 與 [256 of Int] 固定大小陣列;ownership 強化——~Copyable / ~Escapable、**borrow / mutate accessor**、新型別 UniqueBox / UniqueArray / Ref。
跨平台:**@C** 強化 Swift-C 互通、Swift-Java、**WebAssembly + JavaScriptKit**、Embedded Swift;另有 Subprocess 1.0(串流輸出)與 Foundation 的 ProgressManager / Subprogress。

audience: **所有 Swift 開發者;尤其關心 concurrency 安全、效能調校的人。** 32 分鐘塞了 20+ 主題,屬於「先看一句話總結、再用章節軸跳到在意段落」的典型大場。
gloss_en: What's new in Swift
takeaway_en: A big haul at the language level—everyday ergonomics (anyAppleOS, @diagnose, the :: module selector), concurrency and memory safety, performance controls like @specialized / @inline, plus major cross-platform progress (C / Java / Wasm / Embedded).

points_en.text: Everyday syntax: **@available(anyAppleOS 27, *)** replaces enumerating every OS in one line; **@diagnose** precisely controls individual warnings (ignored / warning / error); the **module selector Module::Symbol** resolves same-name conflicts across modules; memberwise init generates multiple versions based on access level.
Concurrency: better diagnostics and Sendable inference (**~Sendable, @unchecked Sendable**); **withTaskCancellationShield** protects critical sections that must not be interrupted.
Standard library: the new **FilePath** type, **Dictionary.mapKeyedValues**, and init(uniqueKeysWithValues:).
Swift Testing updates in step: **Issue severity(.warning)**, Test.cancel, and **bidirectional XCTest interop** (echoing 267).

Performance and memory: **@inline(always/never), @specialized(where:)** directly control optimization; **InlineArray** and [256 of Int] fixed-size arrays; stronger ownership—~Copyable / ~Escapable, the **borrow / mutate accessor**, and new types UniqueBox / UniqueArray / Ref.
Cross-platform: **@C** strengthens Swift-C interop, Swift-Java, **WebAssembly + JavaScriptKit**, Embedded Swift; plus Subprocess 1.0 (streaming output) and Foundation's ProgressManager / Subprogress.

audience_en: **All Swift developers; especially those who care about concurrency safety and performance tuning.** With 20+ topics packed into 32 minutes, this is a classic large session—read the one-sentence summary first, then jump to the sections you care about via the chapter track.

chapters: Setting up Xcode to generate gRPC code
Create a gRPC client connected to a local server
Call the ListRaces RPC and update the view
Disconnect ClientManager when the scene enters the background phase
Inject ClientManager into the view via @Environment
Protobuf message format and binary efficiency
Call the FollowRace RPC in the LiveStreamView

points.text: 介紹開源 RPC 框架 **gRPC**，以 **.proto** 定義服務與訊息（如 ListRaces），並在 Xcode 用 **grpc-swift-proto-generator** 產生 Swift 程式碼。
用 **withGRPCClient** 搭配 **HTTP2ClientTransport** 建立連線，並把產生的 client 包進服務 stub 呼叫 RPC。
以 **@Observable 的 ClientManager** 管理連線生命週期，透過 **@Environment** 注入並在 **scenePhase** 進入背景時斷線。
實作 **FollowRace 雙向串流 RPC**，用 **withThrowingTaskGroup** 同時讀取請求與推送即時的賽車位置與排名更新。

gloss_en: Build real-time apps and services with gRPC and Swift
takeaway_en: Use grpc-swift and bidirectional streaming RPCs to build high-performance real-time experiences between your Swift app and backend.

points_en.text: Introduces the open-source RPC framework **gRPC**, defining services and messages (like ListRaces) in **.proto** and generating Swift code in Xcode with **grpc-swift-proto-generator**.
Use **withGRPCClient** together with **HTTP2ClientTransport** to establish the connection, then wrap the generated client in a service stub to call RPCs.
Manage the connection lifecycle with an **@Observable ClientManager**, inject it via **@Environment**, and disconnect when **scenePhase** enters the background.
Implement the **FollowRace bidirectional streaming RPC**, using **withThrowingTaskGroup** to read requests and push live race position and ranking updates concurrently.
Use **SwiftProtobuf** for efficient binary serialization, then package with a **Containerfile** and deploy to Cloud Run.

title: Migrate to Swift Testing
gloss: 遷移到 Swift Testing
takeaway: 用新的「互通模式」讓 XCTest 與 Swift Testing 共存,不必一次全改,漸進式遷移。

points.text: 遷移策略是**漸進式**:既有 XCTest 原地保留,新測試直接用 Swift Testing 寫,不必先大改。
互通(interoperability)讓你在某框架的測試裡安全呼叫另一框架的 API;四種模式 **Limited / Complete / Strict / None**,在 Xcode Test Plan 或 SPM 設定。
常見轉換對照:**XCTSkip → Test.cancel 或 .enabled(if:) trait**;中止行為 → **try #require**;helper 裡的 XCTFail → **Issue.record(sourceLocation:)**。
參數化測試把巢狀迴圈改成 **@Test(arguments:)**,平行執行更快、失敗報告更清楚。
**Exit tests**:#expect(processExitsWith: .failure) 可覆蓋 preconditionFailure / crash 路徑,在子行程中安全執行。

audience: **手上有大量 XCTest、想導入 Swift Testing 但怕一次全改的團隊。** 可以先用 Strict 模式把新舊測試並行跑起來。
gloss_en: Migrate to Swift Testing
takeaway_en: Use the new interoperability modes to let XCTest and Swift Testing coexist, so you can migrate incrementally instead of converting everything at once.

points_en.text: The migration strategy is **incremental**: keep existing XCTest in place, and write new tests directly in Swift Testing without a big upfront rewrite.
Interoperability lets you safely call one framework's APIs from within the other's tests; four modes **Limited / Complete / Strict / None**, configured in an Xcode Test Plan or SPM.
Common conversion mappings: **XCTSkip → Test.cancel or the .enabled(if:) trait**; aborting behavior → **try #require**; XCTFail inside helpers → **Issue.record(sourceLocation:)**.
Parameterized testing turns nested loops into **@Test(arguments:)**, running in parallel for more speed and clearer failure reports.
**Exit tests**: #expect(processExitsWith: .failure) can cover preconditionFailure / crash paths, running safely in a child process.

audience_en: **Teams with a large XCTest suite who want to adopt Swift Testing but fear converting everything at once.** You can start with Strict mode to run old and new tests side by side.

title: Profile, fix, and verify: Improve app responsiveness with Instruments
gloss: 用 Instruments 剖析、修正並驗證 App 反應速度
takeaway: 用 Swift Concurrency instrument、Time Profiler 與 System Trace 建立「剖析→修正→驗證」的流程,把卡頓工作移出 main actor 來提升反應速度。
chapters: Add signpost interval around Lasso Selection

points.text: 建立清楚的**診斷流程(profile → fix → verify)**,用 **Swift Concurrency instrument、Time Profiler、System Trace** 三件工具搭配。
用 **OSSignposter** 標出關鍵區間(如 Lasso Selection),讓取樣資料更容易對應到實際操作。
比較 **existential(any Foo)、concrete types、generics、enums** 對效能的影響,協助選擇正確的型別表示。
把昂貴工作標成 **@concurrent** 移出 main actor:例如縮圖渲染從 Task 改為 Task { @concurrent } 可避免阻塞 UI。
**System blocking / 檔案寫入**也應移出主執行緒:把 PropertyListEncoder 編碼與 data.write 放進 Task { @concurrent }。

audience: **遇到捲動卡頓、UI 反應遲鈍,想系統化用 Instruments 找出並修正主執行緒瓶頸的 Swift 開發者。**
gloss_en: Profile, fix, and verify: Improve app responsiveness with Instruments
takeaway_en: Use the Swift Concurrency instrument, Time Profiler, and System Trace to build a profile-fix-verify workflow, moving stuttering work off the main actor to improve responsiveness.

points_en.text: Establish a clear **diagnostic workflow (profile → fix → verify)**, pairing the three tools: **Swift Concurrency instrument, Time Profiler, and System Trace**.
Use **OSSignposter** to mark key intervals (such as Lasso Selection) so sampled data maps more easily to actual operations.
Compare the performance impact of **existentials (any Foo), concrete types, generics, and enums** to help choose the right type representation.
Mark expensive work as **@concurrent** to move it off the main actor: for example, changing thumbnail rendering from Task to Task { @concurrent } avoids blocking the UI.
**System blocking / file writes** should also move off the main thread: put PropertyListEncoder encoding and data.write inside Task { @concurrent }.

audience_en: Swift developers **facing scroll stutter or sluggish UI who want to systematically use Instruments to find and fix main-thread bottlenecks**.

title: What’s new in SwiftUI
gloss: SwiftUI 的新功能
takeaway: SwiftUI 帶來全新的 Document 協定、可重新排序的清單與格線、更靈活的工具列控制，以及把 @State 改為 macro 以支援延遲初始化。
chapters: Toolbar item visibility and overflow menu
Minimize toolbar on scroll with toolbarMinimizeBehavior
Document creation sources with context parameter
Use the context to create a document
Implement document writing: list writable formats
Implement document writing: represent the snapshot
Implement document writing: provide a DocumentWriter
Implement document reading with ReadableDocument protocol
Add PNG to supported formats list
Apply changes to a reorderable list's data source
AsyncImage with URLRequest and custom URLSession
@State converted to macro for lazy initialization

points.text: 全新的 **Document 協定**（`ReadableDocument`、`WritableDocument`、`DocumentWriter`）讓文件型 App 直接以 `@Observable` 模型讀寫，並支援多格式（如 .png）與寫入進度回報。
工具列更靈活：可用 `visibilityPriority`、`ToolbarOverflowMenu` 控制顯示與溢位，並用 **`toolbarMinimizeBehavior`** 讓工具列隨捲動縮小。
新增**可重新排序**的清單與格線（`reorderable()`、`reorderContainer`），swipe actions 也可套用到 `List` 以外的任何 view。
**`@State` 改為 macro**，支援延遲初始化（只在 view 生命週期建立一次），並可在 `init` 中賦值。
其他改進包含 `appearsActive` 環境值、`Tab(role: .prominent)`、`AsyncImage` 支援 `URLRequest` 與自訂 `URLSession`，以及新的 `@ContentBuilder`。

audience: **所有 SwiftUI 開發者**，特別是開發文件型 App 或想採用最新版面與資料流改進的人。
gloss_en: What's new in SwiftUI
takeaway_en: SwiftUI brings a brand-new Document protocol, reorderable lists and grids, more flexible toolbar control, and turns @State into a macro to support lazy initialization.

points_en.text: The new **Document protocol** (`ReadableDocument`, `WritableDocument`, `DocumentWriter`) lets document-based apps read and write directly with `@Observable` models, supporting multiple formats (such as .png) and write progress reporting.
Toolbars are more flexible: use `visibilityPriority` and `ToolbarOverflowMenu` to control visibility and overflow, and **`toolbarMinimizeBehavior`** to minimize the toolbar as you scroll.
Adds **reorderable** lists and grids (`reorderable()`, `reorderContainer`), and swipe actions can now be applied to any view beyond `List`.
**`@State` becomes a macro**, supporting lazy initialization (created only once per view lifecycle) and allowing assignment in `init`.
Other improvements include the `appearsActive` environment value, `Tab(role: .prominent)`, `AsyncImage` support for `URLRequest` and a custom `URLSession`, and the new `@ContentBuilder`.

audience_en: **All SwiftUI developers**, especially those building document-based apps or wanting to adopt the latest layout and data-flow improvements.

title: Code-along: Build powerful drag and drop in SwiftUI

points.text: 用 **`reorderable()`** 搭配 `reorderContainer(for:)` 即可在集合內重排序，並以 `apply(difference:)` 套用變更。
以 `dragContainer(for:)` 客製化拖曳來源，支援一次**拖曳多張卡片**的堆疊。
透過 `dragPreviewsFormation(.stack)` 與 `dropPreviewsFormation(.stack)` 控制拖曳與放置時的預覽外觀。
用 `DragConfiguration(allowMove: true)` 設定拖曳行為，允許移動而非僅複製。
以 `dropDestination(for:)` 接收放置，並用 `dropConfiguration` 計算目的地與是否允許 `.move` 操作。

audience: **想在 SwiftUI 中實作進階拖放與清單重排序**的 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Code-along: Build powerful drag and drop in SwiftUI
takeaway_en: By building a game of Solitaire, learn SwiftUI's new **drag-and-drop and reordering APIs**: `reorderable`, `dragContainer`, and `dropDestination`.

points_en.text: Use **`reorderable()`** together with `reorderContainer(for:)` to reorder within a collection, applying changes with `apply(difference:)`.
Customize the drag source with `dragContainer(for:)`, supporting stacks that **drag multiple cards** at once.
Control the preview appearance during dragging and dropping with `dragPreviewsFormation(.stack)` and `dropPreviewsFormation(.stack)`.
Configure drag behavior with `DragConfiguration(allowMove: true)` to allow moving rather than just copying.
Receive drops with `dropDestination(for:)`, using `dropConfiguration` to compute the destination and whether to allow `.move` operations.

audience_en: iOS developers who **want to implement advanced drag and drop and list reordering in SwiftUI**.

title: Use SwiftUI with AppKit and UIKit
gloss: 在 AppKit 與 UIKit 中使用 SwiftUI
takeaway: 藉助 Observation 框架，把 SwiftUI 視圖、手勢、選單與場景漸進式地嵌入既有的 AppKit 或 UIKit App。
chapters: Adding ColorMenu to the Main Menu

points.text: 用 **@Observable** 模型讓 AppKit 與 SwiftUI 共享同一份狀態，達成漸進式採用。
透過 **NSHostingView** 將 SwiftUI 視圖（如自訂色彩選擇器）嵌入 AppKit 介面。
以 **NSGestureRecognizerRepresentable** 把 NSGestureRecognizer（如 Force Click）橋接進 SwiftUI。
使用 **NSHostingMenu** 把 SwiftUI 定義的選單放進 macOS 主選單列。
透過 **NSHostingSceneRepresentation** 動態加入 MenuBarExtra、Settings 等 SwiftUI 場景。

audience: 維護既有 **AppKit 或 UIKit App**、想逐步導入 SwiftUI 的 macOS／iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Use SwiftUI with AppKit and UIKit
takeaway_en: Leverage the Observation framework to incrementally embed SwiftUI views, gestures, menus, and scenes into an existing AppKit or UIKit app.

points_en.text: Use an **@Observable** model to share the same state between AppKit and SwiftUI, enabling incremental adoption.
Embed SwiftUI views (such as a custom color picker) into an AppKit interface via **NSHostingView**.
Bridge an NSGestureRecognizer (such as Force Click) into SwiftUI with **NSGestureRecognizerRepresentable**.
Use **NSHostingMenu** to place a SwiftUI-defined menu into the macOS main menu bar.
Dynamically add SwiftUI scenes like MenuBarExtra and Settings via **NSHostingSceneRepresentation**.

audience_en: macOS/iOS developers maintaining an existing **AppKit or UIKit app** who want to adopt SwiftUI incrementally.

title: What’s new in SwiftData
gloss: SwiftData 的新功能
takeaway: SwiftData 新增分區擷取、以 Codable 持久化自訂與第三方型別，以及 ResultsObserver 與 HistoryObserver 來觀察資料變動與同步歷史。
chapters: // Use observation to update map bounds
// Using HistoryObserver to sync with a server

points.text: 新的**分區擷取**：在 **@Query** 中用 sectionBy 直接依屬性分組，搭配 ForEach 走訪 sections 渲染分區 List。
可用 **@Attribute(.codable)** 與 Codable 巢狀型別持久化**自訂及第三方型別**（如 MKMapItem.Identifier）。
**ResultsObserver** 讓你在 SwiftUI 之外觀察查詢結果變動（例如更新地圖邊界）。
**HistoryObserver** 搭配 withContinuousObservation 追蹤資料變更歷史，適合與伺服器同步。

audience: **使用 SwiftData 做資料持久化**、需要分區顯示、自訂型別儲存或與後端同步的 App 開發者。
gloss_en: What's new in SwiftData
takeaway_en: SwiftData adds sectioned fetching, persisting custom and third-party types with Codable, and ResultsObserver and HistoryObserver for observing data changes and sync history.

points_en.text: New **sectioned fetching**: use sectionBy in **@Query** to group directly by a property, then iterate sections with ForEach to render a sectioned List.
Use **@Attribute(.codable)** with nested Codable types to persist **custom and third-party types** (such as MKMapItem.Identifier).
**ResultsObserver** lets you observe changes to query results outside of SwiftUI (for example, to update map bounds).
**HistoryObserver** with withContinuousObservation tracks the history of data changes, ideal for syncing with a server.

audience_en: App developers **using SwiftData for data persistence** who need sectioned display, custom type storage, or backend syncing.

title: Code-along: Add persistence with SwiftData
gloss: 程式碼實作：用 SwiftData 加入持久化
takeaway: 跟著實作把現有 App 加上 SwiftData 持久化：以 @Model 定義模型與關聯，再用 @Query 在 SwiftUI 中動態查詢資料。
chapters: Convert Activity to a persistent model with @Model
Set up model relationships between Trip, TripImage, and Activity
Enable interoperability between your schema and SwiftUI views
Dynamically construct a query in the initializer of TripCollectionView
Search for trips and activities by name
Capture and report errors from ActivityItemView
Update dateEdited and propagate side effects on property changes

points.text: 跟著實作為現有 App 加上持久化：用 **@Model** 把 Activity、Trip 等類別轉成持久化模型。
以 **@Relationship**（含 deleteRule 與 inverse）定義 Trip、TripImage、Activity 之間的關聯。
在 SwiftUI 中用 **@Query** 搭配 **#Predicate** 與 **FetchDescriptor** 動態查詢、排序與限制筆數，並支援依名稱搜尋。
用 **ModelContainer** 設定容器與種子資料，並在 View 中捕捉與回報儲存錯誤。
透過 **withContinuousObservation** 觀察屬性變更，更新 dateEdited 並連動處理副作用。

audience: **想為 SwiftUI App 加入本地持久化**、正要上手或深入 SwiftData 的開發者。
gloss_en: Code-along: Add persistence with SwiftData
takeaway_en: Follow along to add SwiftData persistence to an existing app: define models and relationships with @Model, then query data dynamically in SwiftUI with @Query.

points_en.text: Follow along to add persistence to an existing app: use **@Model** to turn classes like Activity and Trip into persistent models.
Use **@Relationship** (including deleteRule and inverse) to define the relationships between Trip, TripImage, and Activity.
In SwiftUI, use **@Query** with **#Predicate** and **FetchDescriptor** to dynamically query, sort, and limit results, with support for searching by name.
Use **ModelContainer** to configure the container and seed data, and catch and report save errors in the view.
Use **withContinuousObservation** to observe property changes, update dateEdited, and handle side effects in tandem.

audience_en: **Developers who want to add local persistence to a SwiftUI app** and are just getting started with or going deeper into SwiftData.

title: WidgetKit foundations
gloss: WidgetKit 基礎入門
takeaway: 掌握 WidgetKit 的基本概念，從 StaticConfiguration、支援尺寸、深層連結到隨系統調整的著色渲染模式，打造融入系統的 Widget。

points.text: 以 **StaticConfiguration** 搭配 provider 與 SwiftUI 視圖建立 Widget，並用 **containerBackground** 設定背景。
透過 **supportedFamilies** 宣告支援的 Widget 尺寸，例如 systemMedium。
使用 **widgetURL** 加入深層連結，讓使用者點按 Widget 直接進入 App 對應內容。
搭配 **widgetAccentedRenderingMode** 控制著色渲染模式，使 Widget 隨系統外觀調整。

audience: 適合**第一次開發 Widget、想學會 WidgetKit 基礎的 SwiftUI 開發者**。
gloss_en: WidgetKit foundations
takeaway_en: Master the basics of WidgetKit—from StaticConfiguration, supported sizes, and deep links to accented rendering that adapts to the system—to build widgets that blend into the system.

points_en.text: Build a widget with **StaticConfiguration** together with a provider and a SwiftUI view, and set the background using **containerBackground**.
