Declare the widget sizes you support, such as systemMedium, via **supportedFamilies**.
Use **widgetURL** to add a deep link so tapping the widget takes the user directly to the corresponding content in your app.
Use **widgetAccentedRenderingMode** to control the accented rendering mode so the widget adapts to the system appearance.

audience_en: Ideal for **SwiftUI developers building a widget for the first time who want to learn the WidgetKit foundations**.

title: Modernize your UIKit app
gloss: 現代化你的 UIKit App
takeaway: iOS 27 起 iPhone App 在 iPhone Mirroring 與 iPad 上可自由縮放,要全面改用 size class、丟掉一票 legacy API,Xcode 27 還附了能自動改的 agent skill。

points.text: App 必須能即時適應任意 scene 尺寸;四個要稽核的點:**scene lifecycle、main screen 參照、UI idiom 判斷、interface orientation 判斷**。
**UIScene lifecycle 變成必要**——用最新 SDK 建置時,沒採用的 App 會無法啟動。
**UIScreen.main 不可靠**:改用 windowScene 的 screen、trait collection 的 displayScale、windowScene.effectiveGeometry 取可用空間,並用 registerForTraitChanges 監聽。
UI idiom 與 interface orientation 對 layout 都不再有意義 → **一律改用 size class**(iPhone App 跑在 iPad 仍是 phone idiom 但可縮放;orientation 只是偏好會被忽略)。
導覽列捲動時會自動收合,用 **barMinimizationBehavior** 控制;分頁列新增 sidebar.preferredPlacement 與 prominentTabIdentifier。**.automatic 的 scroll edge effect 視覺有變,之前覆寫成 .soft 的要重新評估**。
Xcode 27 內建 app modernization skill 可自動轉 mainScreen、orientation→size class、遷移 scene lifecycle;xcrun agent skills export 可匯出給其他工具(如 Claude Code)用。

audience: **還在用 UIKit、且有 legacy lifecycle / orientation 假設的成熟專案(像 CUB App)。** 第 10:52「Navigation bars」段落直接對應 iOS 26 導覽列透明問題——很可能就是 scroll edge effect 改版造成的。
gloss_en: Modernize your UIKit app
takeaway_en: Starting in iOS 27, iPhone apps can be freely resized with iPhone Mirroring and on iPad, so you must move fully to size classes, drop a pile of legacy APIs—and Xcode 27 ships an agent skill that can do the migration for you.

points_en.text: Your app must adapt to any scene size on the fly; the four things to audit: **scene lifecycle, main screen references, UI idiom checks, and interface orientation checks**.
**The UIScene lifecycle is now required**—when building with the latest SDK, apps that haven't adopted it will fail to launch.

**UIScreen.main is unreliable**: instead use the windowScene's screen, the trait collection's displayScale, and windowScene.effectiveGeometry for available space, and observe changes with registerForTraitChanges.

UI idiom and interface orientation no longer mean anything for layout → **always use size classes** (an iPhone app running on iPad is still the phone idiom but resizable; orientation is just a preference that gets ignored).

Navigation bars now collapse automatically on scroll, controlled with **barMinimizationBehavior**; tab bars add sidebar.preferredPlacement and prominentTabIdentifier. **The .automatic scroll edge effect looks different now, so reassess anything you previously overrode to .soft.**

Xcode 27's built-in app modernization skill can automatically convert mainScreen, migrate orientation→size class, and migrate the scene lifecycle; xcrun agent skills export can export it for use with other tools (like Claude Code).

audience_en: **Mature projects (like the CUB App) still on UIKit with legacy lifecycle / orientation assumptions.** The 10:52 "Navigation bars" segment maps directly to the iOS 26 transparent navigation bar issue—very likely caused by the scroll edge effect changes.

title: Explore advances in RealityKit
gloss: 探索 RealityKit 的最新進展
takeaway: RealityKit 新增柔和陰影、導航網格、布料模擬、LOD、3D 高斯潑濺與沉浸式音訊等能力，讓 App 與遊戲更擬真、更具沉浸感。

points.text: 強化**光照與陰影**：以 **SpotLightComponent.Shadow** 啟用柔和陰影，並支援投影貼圖與實體空間光照。
新增**導航網格（navigation mesh）**，用 **NavigationController** 計算路徑，支援網格點與離網連結（如梯子）。
提供**布料模擬**，可將布料頂點以 kinematic 方式釘在錨點上。
用 **LevelOfDetailComponent** 依相機距離或螢幕面積切換 LOD，並監聽 thermalState 調整效能。
引入 **3D Gaussian splats（GaussianSplatComponent）**與沉浸式音訊的自訂 reverb 網格與材質。

audience: **開發 visionOS 沉浸式體驗與 3D 遊戲的 RealityKit 開發者**，想提升擬真度與效能的人。
gloss_en: Explore advances in RealityKit
takeaway_en: RealityKit adds soft shadows, navigation meshes, cloth simulation, LOD, 3D Gaussian splats, and immersive audio, making apps and games more realistic and immersive than ever.

points_en.text: Enhanced **lighting and shadows**: enable soft shadows with **SpotLightComponent.Shadow**, with support for projected textures and physical-space lighting.
Adds a **navigation mesh**, using **NavigationController** to compute paths, with support for mesh points and off-mesh links (such as ladders).
Provides **cloth simulation**, letting you pin cloth vertices to anchors in a kinematic manner.
Use **LevelOfDetailComponent** to switch LOD based on camera distance or screen area, and observe thermalState to adjust performance.
Introduces **3D Gaussian splats (GaussianSplatComponent)** and custom reverb meshes and materials for immersive audio.

audience_en: **RealityKit developers building visionOS immersive experiences and 3D games** who want to improve realism and performance.

title: Iterate your spatial scenes faster with Reality Composer Pro 3
gloss: 用 Reality Composer Pro 3 更快迭代空間場景
takeaway: Reality Composer Pro 3 用原型/實例、即時預覽與光照貼圖，大幅加速空間場景的製作迭代。

points.text: 以 **entities 與 components** 的概念組構場景內容，是 Reality Composer Pro 的基礎工作流程。
新的**原型（prototypes）與實例（instances）**機制讓重複內容可一處修改、處處更新。
**即時預覽（Live preview）**能在裝置上即時看到編輯結果，縮短調整迴圈。
支援**光照貼圖（Lightmaps）**提升場景視覺品質，並新增 **Reality Composer Pro Assistant** 協助製作。

audience: 使用 Reality Composer Pro 製作 **visionOS 空間體驗與 3D 場景**的開發者與美術。
gloss_en: Iterate your spatial scenes faster with Reality Composer Pro 3
takeaway_en: Reality Composer Pro 3 uses prototypes/instances, live preview, and lightmaps to dramatically speed up iteration when building spatial scenes.

points_en.text: Compose scene content with the concepts of **entities and components**, the foundational workflow of Reality Composer Pro.
The new **prototypes and instances** mechanism lets you edit repeated content in one place and update it everywhere.
**Live preview** shows editing results in real time on device, shortening the iteration loop.
Supports **Lightmaps** to improve scene visual quality, and adds the **Reality Composer Pro Assistant** to help with authoring.

audience_en: Developers and artists using Reality Composer Pro to build **visionOS spatial experiences and 3D scenes**.

title: Extend Reality Composer Pro 3 functionality with Xcode
gloss: 用 Xcode 擴充 Reality Composer Pro 3 的功能
takeaway: 用 Xcode 寫自訂 component、system、action 與 Script Graph 節點,透過 RealityComposerProPlugin 註冊進 Reality Composer Pro 3,打造更大型的空間專案。

points.text: Reality Composer Pro 3 可用 **Xcode 撰寫專案專屬的編輯器擴充**,支援更大、更有野心的空間專案。
自訂 **Component(如 Cauldron)+ System(CauldronSystem)** 控制實體狀態,並用 EntityComponentQuery 在 update 中查詢。
透過 **RealityComposerProPlugin 的 setup(context:)** 以 registerComponent / registerSystem 把擴充註冊進編輯器(搭配 @_cdecl 進入點)。
自訂動畫用 **EntityAction(SetWaterLevelAction)**,以 subscribe(to: .updated) 依 normalizedTime 內插水位。
用 **@Scriptable macro** 將 component 暴露給 **Script Graph**,再以 RKS.Configuration 註冊 scripting module。

audience: **已用 Reality Composer Pro 製作空間內容、想用 Xcode 加入自訂元件/系統/腳本節點的 visionOS 開發者。**
gloss_en: Extend Reality Composer Pro 3 functionality with Xcode
takeaway_en: Write custom components, systems, actions, and Script Graph nodes in Xcode, register them into Reality Composer Pro 3 via RealityComposerProPlugin, and build larger spatial projects.

points_en.text: Reality Composer Pro 3 lets you **author project-specific editor extensions in Xcode**, supporting bigger, more ambitious spatial projects.
Use a custom **Component (such as Cauldron) plus a System (CauldronSystem)** to control entity state, querying it in update with EntityComponentQuery.
Register extensions into the editor via **RealityComposerProPlugin's setup(context:)** using registerComponent / registerSystem (with an @_cdecl entry point).
For custom animation, use an **EntityAction (SetWaterLevelAction)** and subscribe(to: .updated) to interpolate the water level by normalizedTime.
Use the **@Scriptable macro** to expose a component to **Script Graph**, then register the scripting module via RKS.Configuration.

audience_en: **visionOS developers already building spatial content with Reality Composer Pro who want to add custom components, systems, and script nodes using Xcode.**

title: Discover the Spatial Preview framework
gloss: 認識 Spatial Preview 框架
takeaway: 用全新的 Spatial Preview 框架把 Mac 上的文件與 USD 內容即時串到 visionOS 預覽，並搭配 USDKit 進行即時編輯與標註。
chapters: Document Preview Session with Device Picker
Edit USD live using USDKit and Spatial Preview

points.text: 全新的 **Spatial Preview** 框架可把 Mac 上的內容直接送到 **visionOS** 預覽，透過 `SpatialPreviewDevicePicker` 選擇目標裝置。
支援 **Document Preview**（`DocumentPreviewSession`）即時更新內容，並可觀察 session 狀態以在失效時清理。
搭配 **USDKit** 進行 **USD 即時編輯**（`USDPreviewSession`、`USDStage`），可切換 layout variants 並透過 stage observation 監看變更。
支援標註（annotation）、逐物件操作與匯出等 session 選項，並可用 `Observations` 觀察傳輸進度。

audience: **開發 visionOS 空間內容或 3D／USD 工作流程的開發者與創作者**。
gloss_en: Discover the Spatial Preview framework
takeaway_en: Use the new Spatial Preview framework to stream documents and USD content from your Mac directly into a visionOS preview, paired with USDKit for live editing and annotation.

points_en.text: The new **Spatial Preview** framework sends content from your Mac directly to a **visionOS** preview, choosing the target device with `SpatialPreviewDevicePicker`.
Supports **Document Preview** (`DocumentPreviewSession`) for live content updates, and you can observe session state to clean up when it becomes invalid.
Pairs with **USDKit** for **live USD editing** (`USDPreviewSession`, `USDStage`), letting you switch layout variants and watch changes through stage observation.
Supports session options like annotation, per-object manipulation, and export, and you can observe transfer progress with `Observations`.

audience_en: **Developers and creators building visionOS spatial content or 3D/USD workflows**.

title: Explore enhancements to visionOS object tracking
gloss: 探索 visionOS 物件追蹤的強化功能
takeaway: visionOS 大幅強化**物件追蹤**，支援高更新率追蹤移動物件，並導入空間配件（spatial accessories）輸入。
chapters: Discover and connect a spatial accessory

points.text: 以 `ReferenceObject.Configuration` 開啟 **`highFrameRateTrackingEnabled`**，追蹤移動與手持物件。
在 Mac 上用命令列 `xrun createml objecttracker` 的**擴充訓練模式（extended，all-angles）**產生 `.referenceobject`。
用 `coordinateSpace(correction:)` 取得 `.rendered` 或 `.none` 的物件姿態座標，分別對應顯示校正與公制空間。
物件追蹤也可在 **iOS** 上以 ARKit 實作，用 `detectionObjects`（低更新率）與 `trackingObjects`（高更新率）。
透過 GameController 的 `GCSpatialAccessory` 與 `AccessoryTrackingProvider` 探索並連接**空間配件**，支援隨插即用與動態更新。

audience: **開發 visionOS 空間運算或 AR 物件追蹤、配件互動**的開發者。
gloss_en: Explore enhancements to visionOS object tracking
takeaway_en: visionOS significantly enhances **object tracking**, supporting high-frame-rate tracking of moving objects and introducing spatial accessory input.

points_en.text: Enable **`highFrameRateTrackingEnabled`** via `ReferenceObject.Configuration` to track moving and handheld objects.
Generate a `.referenceobject` on Mac using the command-line `xrun createml objecttracker` with its **extended (all-angles) training mode**.
Use `coordinateSpace(correction:)` to get object pose coordinates in `.rendered` or `.none`, corresponding to display correction and metric space respectively.
Object tracking can also be implemented on **iOS** with ARKit, using `detectionObjects` (low frame rate) and `trackingObjects` (high frame rate).
Discover and connect **spatial accessories** through GameController's `GCSpatialAccessory` and `AccessoryTrackingProvider`, with support for hot-plugging and dynamic updates.

audience_en: Developers **building visionOS spatial computing or AR object tracking and accessory interactions**.

title: Collaborate on structured 3D models in visionOS
gloss: 在 visionOS 中協作操作結構化 3D 模型
takeaway: 在 visionOS 中準備結構化 USDZ 模型，並透過 ManipulationComponent 操作個別零件、組裝、裁切與自動展開。

points.text: 說明如何 **準備結構化 USDZ 資產**，讓模型的各個零件可被個別辨識與操作。
透過操作 **entity hierarchy**，使用者可逐一抓取與移動模型中的子零件。
以 **ManipulationComponent** 搭配 InputTargetComponent 實作組裝的開啟與關閉，並用 releaseBehavior 控制放開後行為。
支援 **互動式裁切（interactive clipping）**，可剖視模型內部結構。
提供 **自動展開（autoexpansion）** 讓複雜組件以爆炸圖方式呈現。

audience: 在 **visionOS 上開發 3D 模型檢視或協作體驗** 的開發者與 3D 內容製作者。
gloss_en: Collaborate on structured 3D models in visionOS
takeaway_en: Prepare structured USDZ models in visionOS and use ManipulationComponent to manipulate individual parts, assemble, clip, and auto-expand them.

points_en.text: Explains how to **prepare structured USDZ assets** so each part of the model can be individually identified and manipulated.
By manipulating the **entity hierarchy**, users can grab and move individual sub-parts of the model one by one.
Use **ManipulationComponent** with InputTargetComponent to implement opening and closing of an assembly, and control post-release behavior with releaseBehavior.
Supports **interactive clipping** to cut away and inspect the model's internal structure.
Provides **autoexpansion** to present complex assemblies as exploded views.

audience_en: Developers and 3D content creators **building 3D model viewing or collaboration experiences on visionOS**.

title: Discover USDKit and what’s new in OpenUSD
gloss: 認識 USDKit 與 OpenUSD 的新功能
takeaway: 全新 Swift 原生的 USDKit 讓你以類型安全的 API 開啟、走訪與編輯 USD Stage，並支援無障礙中繼資料與網格／紋理壓縮匯出。
chapters: OpenUSD: Industry Foundation and New Standards
3D Editing in Preview and New Renderers
Spatial Preview: Live Collaboration Between Mac and Vision Pro
USD on the Web: The Safari Model Tag
USDKit: Key Concepts and Swift API Walkthrough
Moving a Prim with a Transform Operation
Exporting with Mesh and Texture Compression
Integration Paths: USDKit, SwiftUSD, and OpenUSD

points.text: 推出 **Swift 原生的 USDKit**，可建立／開啟 **USDStage**、走訪 prim 階層、定義 Xform 並加入檔案參照。
OpenUSD 採用新標準，支援 **Gaussian Splats 與 Particle Fields**；Preview 可進行 3D 編輯，並與 Vision Pro 即時協作。
可在 USD 中套用 **AccessibilityAPI schema**，為 3D 物件加上 label 與 description 等**無障礙中繼資料**。
匯出 **USDZ** 時可用 preferSmallTextureFiles 與 preferSmallMeshFiles 進行**網格與紋理壓縮**；Safari 也支援 model 標籤呈現 USD。

audience: **處理 3D 內容、AR/visionOS 場景或遊戲資產管線**、需要在 Apple 平台上以 Swift 操作 USD 的開發者。
gloss_en: Discover USDKit and what's new in OpenUSD
takeaway_en: The new Swift-native USDKit lets you open, traverse, and edit a USD Stage with type-safe APIs, with support for accessibility metadata and mesh/texture-compressed export.

points_en.text: Introduces **Swift-native USDKit**, which can create/open a **USDStage**, traverse the prim hierarchy, define Xforms, and add file references.
OpenUSD adopts new standards supporting **Gaussian Splats and Particle Fields**; Preview enables 3D editing and real-time collaboration with Vision Pro.
Apply the **AccessibilityAPI schema** in USD to add **accessibility metadata** such as label and description to 3D objects.
When exporting **USDZ**, use preferSmallTextureFiles and preferSmallMeshFiles for **mesh and texture compression**; Safari also supports rendering USD via the model tag.

audience_en: **Developers working with 3D content, AR/visionOS scenes, or game asset pipelines** who need to work with USD in Swift on Apple platforms.

title: Use foveated streaming to bring immersive content to visionOS
gloss: 用注視點串流把沉浸式內容帶到 visionOS
takeaway: 用 FoveatedStreaming 框架把遠端算繪的場景以全保真度串流到 Apple Vision Pro，並與 SwiftUI、RealityKit 內容整合。
chapters: Display a Foveated Streaming session in your immersive space
Compose SwiftUI content with Foveated Streaming
Compose RealityKit content with Foveated Streaming

points.text: **注視點串流（Foveated Streaming）**能把遠端算繪的場景以**全保真度**串流到 Apple Vision Pro。
了解其運作原理，並設定**串流端點（streaming endpoint）**與打造 visionOS 接收端 App。
用 **FoveatedStreamingSession** 連線，並透過 **ImmersiveSpace(foveatedStreaming:)** 在沉浸式空間中顯示。
可與 **SwiftUI** 及 **RealityKit** 內容合成，並量測效能、結合更多 visionOS 功能強化體驗。

audience: **開發 visionOS 沉浸式體驗、需要串流遠端高保真算繪內容**到 Vision Pro 的開發者。
gloss_en: Use foveated streaming to bring immersive content to visionOS
takeaway_en: Use the FoveatedStreaming framework to stream remotely rendered scenes to Apple Vision Pro in full fidelity, integrating with SwiftUI and RealityKit content.

points_en.text: **Foveated Streaming** can stream remotely rendered scenes to Apple Vision Pro in **full fidelity**.
Understand how it works, set up the **streaming endpoint**, and build the visionOS receiving app.
Connect with **FoveatedStreamingSession** and display it in an immersive space via **ImmersiveSpace(foveatedStreaming:)**.
Compose it with **SwiftUI** and **RealityKit** content, measure performance, and combine it with more visionOS features to enhance the experience.

audience_en: Developers **building immersive visionOS experiences who need to stream remotely rendered, high-fidelity content** to Vision Pro.

title: Build next-generation experiences with visionOS 27
gloss: 用 visionOS 27 打造次世代體驗
takeaway: visionOS 27 提供多條建構空間體驗的路徑，涵蓋 RealityKit、第三方遊戲引擎、Foveated Streaming、物件追蹤與沉浸式媒體等新能力。
chapters: Paths to build a visionOS experience

points.text: 介紹建構 visionOS 體驗的多條路徑，從 **RealityKit** 與 **Reality Composer Pro** 到第三方遊戲引擎皆可選擇。
**Foveated Streaming** 依注視點優化串流畫質，提升沉浸式內容的效能與品質。
新增 **object tracking** 與 **spatial accessories** 支援，擴展實體互動的可能性。
強化 **immersive media** 與 **Spatial Preview**，讓沉浸式媒體製作與預覽更順暢。

audience: 適合**想在 visionOS 27 上開發 App、遊戲或空間體驗的開發者**，尤其想了解整體建構路徑者。
gloss_en: Build next-generation experiences with visionOS 27
takeaway_en: visionOS 27 offers multiple pathways for building spatial experiences, spanning new capabilities like RealityKit, third-party game engines, Foveated Streaming, object tracking, and immersive media.

points_en.text: Introduces the multiple pathways for building visionOS experiences, from **RealityKit** and **Reality Composer Pro** to third-party game engines.
**Foveated Streaming** optimizes streaming quality based on the gaze point, improving the performance and quality of immersive content.
Adds support for **object tracking** and **spatial accessories**, expanding the possibilities for physical interaction.
Enhances **immersive media** and **Spatial Preview**, making immersive media production and previewing smoother.

audience_en: **Developers who want to build apps, games, or spatial experiences on visionOS 27**, especially those wanting to understand the overall building pathways.

title: Modernize your AppKit app
gloss: 現代化你的 AppKit App
takeaway: 用手勢辨識、控制事件、現代拖放與狀態還原把 AppKit App 更新到當代 macOS 慣例，並導入 macOS 27 的 Liquid Glass 與同心圓角。
chapters: Modern event handling with gesture recognizers
Selection, context menus, and drag and drop
Set window identifiers for state restoration

points.text: 以**手勢辨識器（gesture recognizers）**處理現代輸入，並用 **NSPasteboardWriting** 採用現代拖放委派。
使用 **control events**（如 `.trackingEndedOutside`）與 hitTest 覆寫，改善控制項互動。
以 **autorecalculatesKeyViewLoop** 與 **NSStatusItemExpandedInterfaceDelegate** 強化鍵盤導覽與狀態列項目。
透過 **encodeRestorableState / restoreState** 與視窗識別碼做**狀態還原**，並優雅處理 App 終止。
導入 **macOS 27 的 Liquid Glass**，以 **cornerConfiguration** 實現同心圓角（concentricity）。

audience: **維護既有 AppKit macOS App 的開發者**，想跟上現代 macOS 慣例與 Liquid Glass 外觀的人。
gloss_en: Modernize your AppKit app
takeaway_en: Bring your AppKit app up to contemporary macOS conventions with gesture recognition, control events, modern drag and drop, and state restoration, and adopt macOS 27's Liquid Glass and concentric corners.

points_en.text: Handle modern input with **gesture recognizers**, and adopt modern drag and drop with **NSPasteboardWriting**.
Use **control events** (such as `.trackingEndedOutside`) and hitTest overrides to improve control interactions.
Strengthen keyboard navigation and status bar items with **autorecalculatesKeyViewLoop** and **NSStatusItemExpandedInterfaceDelegate**.
Do **state restoration** via **encodeRestorableState / restoreState** and window identifiers, and handle app termination gracefully.
Adopt **macOS 27's Liquid Glass**, achieving concentric corners (concentricity) with **cornerConfiguration**.

audience_en: **Developers maintaining an existing AppKit macOS app** who want to keep up with modern macOS conventions and the Liquid Glass look.

title: Craft clear names for features and labels in your app
gloss: 為 App 的功能與標籤取清楚的名稱
takeaway: 好的功能與標籤命名能直接影響使用者是否看得懂、找得到，值得用明確準則與流程來打磨。

points.text: 命名會決定使用者如何**理解與瀏覽**你的 App，是體驗的一部分而非小事。
提出評估名稱好壞的**準則（Criteria）**，作為取名時的判斷依據。
介紹一套可重複的**命名流程（Process）**，協助團隊系統化地產生候選名稱。
說明如何**評估（Evaluation）**候選名稱並做出選擇。

audience: 負責 App 功能命名、UX 文案與資訊架構的**設計師、產品與工程團隊**。
gloss_en: Craft clear names for features and labels in your app
takeaway_en: Good feature and label naming directly affects whether users understand and can find things, and is worth refining with clear criteria and a process.

points_en.text: Naming determines how users **understand and navigate** your app; it's part of the experience, not a minor detail.
Presents **criteria** for evaluating whether a name is good, to guide your naming decisions.
Introduces a repeatable **naming process** to help teams generate candidate names systematically.
Explains how to **evaluate** candidate names and make a choice.

audience_en: **Designers, product, and engineering teams** responsible for feature naming, UX copy, and information architecture.

title: Design intuitive search experiences
gloss: 設計直覺的搜尋體驗
takeaway: 從搜尋欄的呈現、放置位置到最佳實務,設計讓人快速找到內容的直覺搜尋體驗。

points.text: 探討在 App 中實作搜尋的**新模式與最佳實務**,讓搜尋在「幫人找到內容」上扮演關鍵角色。
**Search field(搜尋欄)**:說明搜尋欄本身的設計與呈現方式。
**Patterns and placement(模式與放置)**:這是最長的章節,聚焦搜尋入口要放在哪、用何種模式呈現。
**Best practices(最佳實務)**:歸納設計搜尋體驗時應遵循的原則。
整體偏**設計導向**,著重使用者如何更快速、直覺地找到所需內容。

audience: **負責 App 搜尋體驗的設計師與產品團隊,想了解搜尋入口的擺放與互動模式。**
gloss_en: Design intuitive search experiences
takeaway_en: From how the search field is presented to where it's placed and the best practices, design intuitive search experiences that help people find content fast.

points_en.text: Explores **new patterns and best practices** for implementing search in your app, where search plays a key role in helping people find content.
**Search field**: covers the design and presentation of the search field itself.
**Patterns and placement**: the longest chapter, focused on where to put the search entry point and which patterns to present it with.
**Best practices**: distills the principles to follow when designing search experiences.
Overall it's **design-oriented**, emphasizing how users can find what they need more quickly and intuitively.

audience_en: **Designers and product teams responsible for an app's search experience who want to understand search entry-point placement and interaction patterns.**

title: Validate your App Intents adoption with AppIntentsTesting
gloss: 用 AppIntentsTesting 驗證你的 App Intents
takeaway: 用全新的 AppIntentsTesting 框架，透過與 Siri、Shortcuts 相同的基礎架構來自動化測試你的 App Intents、entity 查詢、Spotlight 索引與畫面標註。
chapters: Your first test: execute an intent
Chain multiple intents in one test

points.text: 全新的 **AppIntentsTesting** 框架透過 Siri 與 Shortcuts 相同的基礎架構執行測試，用 `IntentDefinitions` 取得並 `run()` 你的 intent。
可測試 **entity 查詢**（含 `EntityStringQuery` 的 `entities(matching:)`），驗證搜尋結果是否正確。
支援在單一測試中**串接多個 intent**（如建立後再更新事件），並可用 `isDiscoverable = false` 建立僅供測試的 intent。
能驗證 **Spotlight 索引**（`spotlightQuery`）與**畫面標註（view annotations）**，搭配 `XCUIApplication` 確認 UI 呈現正確內容。

audience: **已採用或正在採用 App Intents、想為 Siri 與 Shortcuts 整合建立自動化測試的開發者**。
gloss_en: Validate your App Intents with AppIntentsTesting
takeaway_en: Use the new AppIntentsTesting framework to automate testing of your App Intents, entity queries, Spotlight indexing, and view annotations through the same infrastructure as Siri and Shortcuts.

points_en.text: The new **AppIntentsTesting** framework runs tests through the same infrastructure as Siri and Shortcuts, using `IntentDefinitions` to obtain and `run()` your intent.
You can test **entity queries** (including `EntityStringQuery`'s `entities(matching:)`) to verify that search results are correct.
Supports **chaining multiple intents** in a single test (such as creating an event and then updating it), and lets you create test-only intents with `isDiscoverable = false`.
Can validate **Spotlight indexing** (`spotlightQuery`) and **view annotations**, using `XCUIApplication` to confirm the UI presents the correct content.

audience_en: **Developers who have adopted or are adopting App Intents and want to build automated tests for their Siri and Shortcuts integration**.

title: Best practices for integrating visual intelligence in your app
gloss: 在 App 中整合視覺智慧的最佳實務
takeaway: 用 **Visual Intelligence** 搭配 App Intents 與 Vision 特徵比對，讓使用者以相機影像在你的 App 中探索內容。
chapters: Define the content you want to return as an App Entity
Build a catalog of albums with precomputed feature prints
Search the catalog for albums matching the captured image
Create an open intent to land users on the right screen
Use UnionValue to return multiple visual search result types
Expand the IntentValueQuery to return the UnionValue
Provide a link to in-app search
Request calendar access and fetch upcoming concerts
Filter for upcoming events that match known artists in our catalog

points.text: 把可回傳的內容定義成 **`AppEntity`**，並用 `IntentValueQuery` 接收 `SemanticContentDescriptor` 回傳視覺搜尋結果。
以 Vision 的 `GenerateImageFeaturePrintRequest` 預先計算**特徵指紋（feature print）**，再用 `distance(to:)` 比對拍攝影像。
用 `OpenIntent` 讓搜尋結果直接開啟到正確畫面，並用 `@UnionValue` 回傳多種結果類型（如專輯與演唱會）。
透過 `@AppIntent(schema: .visualIntelligence.semanticContentSearch)` 提供「**在 App 中繼續搜尋**」的入口。
整合系統 store 與 **EventKit**，請求行事曆權限抓取演唱會並監聽 `EKEventStoreChanged` 更新。

audience: **想讓 App 內容能透過相機與視覺智慧被探索**的 iOS／iPad／Mac 開發者。
gloss_en: Best practices for integrating visual intelligence in your app
takeaway_en: Use **Visual Intelligence** together with App Intents and Vision feature matching to let users discover content in your app from camera imagery.

points_en.text: Define returnable content as an **`AppEntity`**, and use `IntentValueQuery` to receive a `SemanticContentDescriptor` and return visual search results.
Precompute a **feature print** with Vision's `GenerateImageFeaturePrintRequest`, then compare it against the captured image using `distance(to:)`.
Use `OpenIntent` to open search results directly to the right screen, and `@UnionValue` to return multiple result types (such as albums and concerts).
Provide a "**continue searching in the app**" entry point via `@AppIntent(schema: .visualIntelligence.semanticContentSearch)`.
Integrate the system store with **EventKit**, requesting calendar access to fetch concerts and listening for `EKEventStoreChanged` updates.

audience_en: iOS/iPad/Mac developers who want **their app's content to be discoverable through the camera and visual intelligence**.

title: Meet the Evaluations framework
gloss: 認識 Evaluations 框架
takeaway: 在機率性的 AI 世界裡，用 Evaluations 框架以資料集、metrics 與 model judge 系統化評估模型驅動功能的品質。
chapters: Demo app Book Tacker: a manual evaluation
Run with Swift Testing and an optimization target
Running the evaluation and reading the report
Synthesize more samples with a SampleGenerator
More evaluators: word count and genre
Add app context with a ModelJudgePrompt

points.text: 在機率性世界中，**單元測試不足以驗證模型行為**，需要專門的 Evaluations 框架。
用 **Evaluation** 搭配 **ModelSample** 資料集定義要評估的功能，並可用 SampleGenerator 合成更多樣本。
透過 **Metric** 與 **Evaluator** 定義通過／失敗條件，並用 MetricsAggregator 跨樣本彙總統計。
可用 **.evaluates** 與 Swift Testing 整合，設定 optimization target 並以 hill-climbing 迭代 instructions。
以 **ModelJudgeEvaluator** 進行質性評分，並用 ScoreDimension 與 ModelJudgePrompt 細分維度。

audience: 正在打造 **模型驅動或生成式 AI 功能**、需要系統化衡量輸出品質的開發者。
gloss_en: Meet the Evaluations framework
takeaway_en: In a probabilistic AI world, use the Evaluations framework to systematically assess the quality of model-driven features with datasets, metrics, and a model judge.

points_en.text: In a probabilistic world, **unit tests alone aren't enough to verify model behavior**; a dedicated Evaluations framework is needed.
Use **Evaluation** with a **ModelSample** dataset to define the feature to evaluate, and use SampleGenerator to synthesize more samples.
Define pass/fail criteria with **Metric** and **Evaluator**, and use MetricsAggregator to aggregate statistics across samples.
Integrate with Swift Testing via **.evaluates**, set an optimization target, and iterate on instructions with hill-climbing.
Use **ModelJudgeEvaluator** for qualitative scoring, and break it down by dimension with ScoreDimension and ModelJudgePrompt.

audience_en: Developers building **model-driven or generative AI features** who need to systematically measure output quality.

title: Create robust evaluations for agentic apps
gloss: 為 agentic App 建立穩健的評估
takeaway: 運用 Evaluations 框架以 makeSamples 產生合成資料、驗證樣本，並用 TrajectoryExpectation 評估工具呼叫的順序與引數，打造穩健的 agentic 評估。

points.text: 用 **makeSamples** 與自訂 **SampleGenerator** 產生多樣化的**合成資料**，解決評估資料集不足的問題。
透過 **validator** 閉包驗證樣本，並可分別存取 valid 與 **invalidSamples**，再比較不同評估結果。
以 **TrajectoryExpectation** 與 **ToolExpectation** 評估工具呼叫，支援 ordered／unordered 與 disallowed。
引數比對提供 **.exact、.naturalLanguage、.keyOnly、.range、.contains** 等 matcher，可依語意而非字面匹配。
用 **ToolCallEvaluator** 搭配 Metric（allPass／percentagePass）建立完整的工具呼叫評估流程。

audience: **建構 agentic 或工具呼叫型 AI 功能**、需要系統化評估模型行為與品質的開發者。
gloss_en: Create robust evaluations for agentic apps
takeaway_en: Use the Evaluations framework to generate synthetic data with makeSamples, validate samples, and assess the order and arguments of tool calls with TrajectoryExpectation to build robust agentic evaluations.

points_en.text: Use **makeSamples** with a custom **SampleGenerator** to generate diverse **synthetic data**, solving the problem of insufficient evaluation datasets.
Validate samples with a **validator** closure, access valid and **invalidSamples** separately, and compare different evaluation results.
Evaluate tool calls with **TrajectoryExpectation** and **ToolExpectation**, supporting ordered/unordered and disallowed.
Argument matching offers matchers like **.exact, .naturalLanguage, .keyOnly, .range, .contains**, matching by meaning rather than literal text.
Use **ToolCallEvaluator** with a Metric (allPass/percentagePass) to build a complete tool-call evaluation flow.

audience_en: **Developers building agentic or tool-calling AI features** who need to systematically evaluate model behavior and quality.

title: Build a responsive camera app that launches quickly
gloss: 打造啟動快速且反應靈敏的相機 App
takeaway: 用 AVFoundation 的延遲啟動、反應式擷取與確定性檔案寫入，打造瞬間啟動、不錯失畫面的相機 App。
chapters: Adopt AVProVideoStorage for deterministic file write speeds

points.text: 用**延遲啟動（deferred start）**讓相機**瞬間啟動**：先顯示預覽，再延後啟動非必要的輸出，避免錯失關鍵畫面。
可採**自動**或**手動**延遲啟動，透過 **automaticallyRunsDeferredStart**、isDeferredStartEnabled 與 **runDeferredStartWhenNeeded** 控制時機。
啟用**反應式擷取（responsive capture）**與穩定預覽，讓 **AVCapturePhotoOutput** 能立即拍照。
監控 **hardwareCost** 與 **systemPressureState** 維持持續效能，必要時改用低成本設定。
用 **AVProVideoStorage** 達成確定性的檔案寫入速度，妥善管理專業影片儲存空間。

audience: **開發相機或影音擷取 App**、在意啟動速度、拍攝反應與錄影效能的開發者。
gloss_en: Build a responsive camera app that launches quickly
takeaway_en: Use AVFoundation's deferred start, responsive capture, and deterministic file writing to build a camera app that launches instantly and never misses the shot.

points_en.text: Use **deferred start** to launch the camera **instantly**: show the preview first, then defer starting non-essential outputs to avoid missing the key moment.
Use **automatic** or **manual** deferred start, controlling the timing via **automaticallyRunsDeferredStart**, isDeferredStartEnabled, and **runDeferredStartWhenNeeded**.
Enable **responsive capture** and a stable preview so **AVCapturePhotoOutput** can take photos immediately.
Monitor **hardwareCost** and **systemPressureState** to maintain sustained performance, switching to lower-cost settings when necessary.
Use **AVProVideoStorage** to achieve deterministic file-write speeds and properly manage professional video storage.

audience_en: Developers **building camera or audio/video capture apps** who care about launch speed, capture responsiveness, and recording performance.

title: Implement high resolution photo capture
gloss: 實作高解析度照片拍攝
takeaway: 運用 AVFoundation 設定 maxPhotoDimensions 與品質優先級，並預先準備管線，在 App 中拍出超高解析度照片同時維持回應速度。

points.text: 介紹三種拍攝選項與各自適用時機，協助為高解析度照片做正確選擇。
在 **AVCapturePhotoOutput** 上設定 **maxPhotoDimensions**，並從 activeFormat 取得支援的最大尺寸。
透過 **AVCapturePhotoSettings** 的 **photoQualityPrioritization** 在畫質與速度間取得平衡。
以 **setPreparedPhotoSettingsArray** 預先準備管線，並在實際拍攝時建立全新的 settings，維持回應式拍攝。

audience: 適合**開發相機或攝影類 App、需要拍攝高解析度照片的開發者**。
gloss_en: Implement high resolution photo capture
takeaway_en: Use AVFoundation to set maxPhotoDimensions and quality prioritization, and prepare the pipeline ahead of time to capture super high resolution photos in your app while staying responsive.

points_en.text: Introduces three capture options and when each is appropriate, helping you make the right choice for high resolution photos.
Set **maxPhotoDimensions** on **AVCapturePhotoOutput**, and get the maximum supported dimensions from activeFormat.
Balance quality against speed with **AVCapturePhotoSettings**' **photoQualityPrioritization**.
Prepare the pipeline ahead of time with **setPreparedPhotoSettingsArray**, and create a fresh settings object for each actual capture to stay responsive.

audience_en: **Developers building camera or photography apps who need to capture high resolution photos.**

title: Enhance RAW image processing with Core Image
gloss: 用 Core Image 強化 RAW 影像處理
takeaway: Core Image RAW 第 9 版大幅提升畫質與效能，並讓 CIImageProcessor 支援自訂輸出 tile 大小與暫存 PixelBuffer，打造更佳的互動式編輯。
chapters: Enable and edit RAW 9 with CIRAWFilter API
CIImageProcessor with explicit output tile sizes

points.text: Core Image **RAW 第 9 版**大幅改善影像**畫質**，並回顧 RAW 支援的演進。
以 **CIRAWFilter API** 啟用並編輯 RAW 9，搭配說明其**效能**特性。
針對**互動式編輯**與匯出其他格式提供建議，例如以 `.cacheIntermediate: false` 與 memoryLimit 設定匯出用的 CIContext。
**CIImageProcessorKernel** 新增以明確 tile 大小套用處理（`apply(withTiledExtent:)`）的能力。
可向 Core Image 取得**暫存 PixelBuffer**（temporaryPixelBuffer）作為運算 scratch 緩衝。

audience: **開發相機、相片編輯或專業影像 App 的開發者**，需處理 RAW 與自訂影像管線的人。
gloss_en: Enhance RAW image processing with Core Image
takeaway_en: Core Image RAW version 9 dramatically improves image quality and performance, and lets CIImageProcessor support custom output tile sizes and temporary PixelBuffers for better interactive editing.

points_en.text: Core Image **RAW version 9** dramatically improves image **quality**, with a look back at the evolution of RAW support.
Enable and edit RAW 9 with the **CIRAWFilter API**, along with an explanation of its **performance** characteristics.
Offers recommendations for **interactive editing** and exporting to other formats, such as configuring an export CIContext with `.cacheIntermediate: false` and a memoryLimit.
**CIImageProcessorKernel** adds the ability to apply processing with an explicit tile size (`apply(withTiledExtent:)`).
You can request a **temporary PixelBuffer** (temporaryPixelBuffer) from Core Image to use as a scratch buffer for computation.

audience_en: **Developers building camera, photo editing, or professional imaging apps** who need to handle RAW and custom image pipelines.

title: Explore Retention Messaging in App Store Connect
gloss: 探索 App Store Connect 的挽留訊息
takeaway: 用 Retention Messaging 在訂閱者取消前即時提供訊息、替代方案或促銷優惠，提高續訂率。
chapters: Retention Messaging in App Store Connect

points.text: **Retention Messaging** 讓你在訂閱者按下取消前主動觸及他們，是降低流失的新工具。
可在 **App Store Connect** 直接設定挽留訊息，無需改動 App 即可上線基本情境。
**即時（Real-time）** 模式會在取消當下向你的伺服器發出請求，由你動態決定回應內容。
回應可選擇純**訊息（message）**、**替代產品（alternateProduct）**，或帶簽章的**促銷優惠（promotionalOffer）**。
透過 **Retention Messaging API** 設定 URL、訊息與圖片，並可在 Sandbox 進行效能測試。

audience: 經營**自動續訂訂閱、想在取消前挽留訂閱者**的 App Store 開發者與營運團隊。
gloss_en: Explore Retention Messaging in App Store Connect
takeaway_en: Use Retention Messaging to deliver a timely message, an alternate product, or a promotional offer to subscribers before they cancel, improving renewal rates.

points_en.text: **Retention Messaging** lets you proactively reach subscribers before they tap cancel, a new tool for reducing churn.
Configure retention messages directly in **App Store Connect**, with no app changes needed to launch the basic scenarios.
**Real-time** mode sends a request to your server at the moment of cancellation, letting you decide the response dynamically.
The response can be a plain **message**, an **alternateProduct**, or a signed **promotionalOffer**.
Set the URL, message, and image via the **Retention Messaging API**, and run performance testing in Sandbox.

audience_en: App Store developers and operations teams running **auto-renewable subscriptions who want to retain subscribers before they cancel**.

title: What’s new in Shortcuts
gloss: 捷徑有什麼新東西
takeaway: Shortcuts 新增自動化與「Use Model」動作,讓你能用 App 的 AppEntity 內容串接 Apple Intelligence 模型,打造更強大的捷徑。

points.text: 用 App 的內容打造更強大的捷徑,**新的 automations** 解鎖更多整合 App 的方式。
新增 **Use Model** 動作,可在捷徑中直接呼叫模型處理 App 的資料。
示範以 **AppEntity(SoupEntity)** 暴露 App 內容,搭配 @Property 標註可被捷徑使用的屬性。
用 **TypeDisplayRepresentation 與 DisplayRepresentation** 定義 entity 在捷徑中的顯示(含 numericFormat)。
涵蓋 **Storage** 章節,說明捷徑如何存取與保存資料。

audience: **想讓 App 內容透過 Shortcuts 與 Apple Intelligence 模型串接、提供自動化能力的開發者。**
gloss_en: What's new in Shortcuts
takeaway_en: Shortcuts adds new automations and a "Use Model" action, letting you wire your app's AppEntity content into Apple Intelligence models to build more powerful shortcuts.

points_en.text: Build more powerful shortcuts with your app's content; **new automations** unlock additional ways to integrate your app.
Adds the **Use Model** action, letting you call a model directly within a shortcut to process your app's data.
Demonstrates exposing app content with an **AppEntity (SoupEntity)**, using @Property to annotate which properties are available to Shortcuts.
Use **TypeDisplayRepresentation and DisplayRepresentation** to define how an entity appears in Shortcuts (including numericFormat).
Covers the **Storage** chapter, explaining how shortcuts access and persist data.

audience_en: **Developers who want to wire their app's content into Apple Intelligence models through Shortcuts and provide automation capabilities.**

title: Meet the Now Playing framework
gloss: 認識 Now Playing 框架
takeaway: 用全新的 Now Playing 框架，讓 App 的媒體播放透過 MediaSession 連接到鎖定畫面等系統介面，並支援遠端播放與裝置控制。

points.text: 全新的 **Now Playing** 框架讓 App 的播放狀態連接到**鎖定畫面等系統介面**，是現代化的 Swift 媒體整合方式。
讓 `@Observable` 的播放模型採用 **`MediaSessionRepresentable`**，提供 content、`playbackSnapshot` 與 `commands`，再以 `MediaSession` 建立連結。
透過 App extension 與 **`RemoteMediaSessionRepresentable`** 支援遠端媒體 session，並以 `MediaDevice` 描述喇叭與音量等裝置能力。
藝術圖透過 `Artwork` 以非同步方式依尺寸提供，命令（play／pause／next／previous）可直接綁定播放器或送往伺服器。

audience: **開發音樂、Podcast、影音或任何媒體播放 App 的開發者**，想整合系統播放控制與遠端播放的人。
gloss_en: Meet the Now Playing framework
takeaway_en: Use the new Now Playing framework to connect your app's media playback to system surfaces like the Lock Screen through MediaSession, with support for remote playback and device control.

points_en.text: The new **Now Playing** framework connects your app's playback state to **system surfaces like the Lock Screen**, a modern Swift approach to media integration.
Have your `@Observable` playback model adopt **`MediaSessionRepresentable`**, providing content, `playbackSnapshot`, and `commands`, then establish the connection with `MediaSession`.
Support remote media sessions through an App extension and **`RemoteMediaSessionRepresentable`**, using `MediaDevice` to describe device capabilities like speakers and volume.
Artwork is provided asynchronously by size through `Artwork`, and commands (play/pause/next/previous) can bind directly to your player or be sent to a server.

audience_en: **Developers building music, podcast, video, or any media playback apps** who want to integrate system playback controls and remote playback.

title: Learn CSS Grid Lanes
gloss: 認識 CSS Grid Lanes
takeaway: 全新的 **CSS Grid Lanes** 讓你用 `display: grid-lanes` 排列各種形狀大小的內容，打造能自適應的網頁版面。

points.text: 用 **`display: grid-lanes`** 建立容器，結合 `grid-template-columns` 與 `gap` 即可排列不同形狀的內容。
搭配 `repeat(auto-fill, minmax(...))` 做出能自適應的**磚塊式（brick）**版面與多種欄寬組合。
以 `grid-column: span 2` 或 `grid-column: 2 / span 2` 控制個別項目的跨欄與位置。
整合 **Subgrid**（`grid-template-columns: subgrid`）讓子項目對齊父層格線。
用新的 **`flow-tolerance`** 屬性調整項目排列的容差，並可在 Web Inspector 中檢視 Grid Lanes。

audience: **使用 Safari／WebKit 開發自適應網頁版面**的前端開發者。
gloss_en: Learn CSS Grid Lanes
takeaway_en: The new **CSS Grid Lanes** lets you arrange content of all shapes and sizes with `display: grid-lanes` to build adaptive web layouts.

points_en.text: Create a container with **`display: grid-lanes`**, then combine `grid-template-columns` and `gap` to arrange differently-shaped content.
Pair it with `repeat(auto-fill, minmax(...))` to build adaptive **brick** layouts and varied column-width combinations.
Control an individual item's column span and position with `grid-column: span 2` or `grid-column: 2 / span 2`.
Integrate **Subgrid** (`grid-template-columns: subgrid`) to align child items to the parent grid lines.
Adjust the tolerance of item placement with the new **`flow-tolerance`** property, and inspect Grid Lanes in Web Inspector.

audience_en: **Front-end developers building adaptive web layouts with Safari/WebKit**.

title: Rediscover the HTML select element
gloss: 重新認識 HTML select 元素
takeaway: 透過 appearance: base-select 與新的 CSS 偽元素，全面自訂網頁 select 選單的外觀與下拉內容。

points.text: 新的 **appearance: base-select** 解鎖對原生 select 表單控制項的完整樣式控制。
可用 **::picker(select)** 與 **:open** 狀態自訂下拉面板的邊框、陰影與圖示。
透過 **option::checkmark** 與 option:checked 自訂選項勾選標記與選取樣式。
選項可放入 **圖片** 並以 grid 版面排列，超越純文字選單。
用 **selectedcontent** 元素自訂按鈕顯示，並為不支援的瀏覽器準備 fallback。

audience: 需要 **深度自訂網頁表單下拉選單** 樣式與互動的前端 Web 開發者。
gloss_en: Rediscover the HTML select element
takeaway_en: Use appearance: base-select and new CSS pseudo-elements to fully customize the appearance and dropdown content of web select menus.

points_en.text: The new **appearance: base-select** unlocks full styling control over the native select form control.
Use **::picker(select)** with the **:open** state to customize the dropdown panel's border, shadow, and icons.
Use **option::checkmark** and option:checked to customize the option checkmark and selected styling.
Options can contain **images** and be laid out with grid, going beyond plain-text menus.
Use the **selectedcontent** element to customize the button display, and prepare a fallback for browsers that don't support it.

audience_en: Front-end web developers who need to **deeply customize the styling and interaction of web form dropdowns**.

title: Build with the new Apple Foundation Model on Private Cloud Compute
gloss: 在 Private Cloud Compute 上使用全新 Apple Foundation Model 開發
takeaway: 只需一行改用 PrivateCloudComputeLanguageModel，即可在保護隱私的前提下取用前沿級模型，並享有更大 context、推理層級控制與用量限制處理。
chapters: Switch to the PCC server model (one-line change)
Structured output and tools work the same

points.text: **Private Cloud Compute（PCC）** 讓你存取**前沿級模型**同時保護使用者隱私，只需把模型換成 **PrivateCloudComputeLanguageModel**（一行變更）。
**結構化輸出（@Generable）與工具呼叫**在 PCC 上用法完全相同；可用 model.isAvailable 檢查可用性。
可透過 **ContextOptions(reasoningLevel:)** 設定 .light/.moderate/.deep 推理層級；PCC 的 **contextSize 達 32768**，遠大於裝置端。
用 **quotaUsage** 處理**用量限制**：偵測接近上限、超出，並可顯示 limitIncreaseSuggestion 引導使用者。

audience: **想在 App 中使用更強大模型、又需兼顧隱私**的開發者，尤其需要大 context 或深度推理的情境。
gloss_en: Build with the new Apple Foundation Model on Private Cloud Compute
takeaway_en: With a single line switching to PrivateCloudComputeLanguageModel, you can access frontier-class models while protecting privacy, gaining a larger context, reasoning-level control, and quota handling.

points_en.text: **Private Cloud Compute (PCC)** lets you access **frontier-class models** while protecting user privacy; just swap the model for **PrivateCloudComputeLanguageModel** (a one-line change).
**Structured output (@Generable) and tool calling** work exactly the same on PCC; use model.isAvailable to check availability.
Set the reasoning level to .light/.moderate/.deep via **ContextOptions(reasoningLevel:)**; PCC's **contextSize reaches 32768**, far larger than on-device.
Use **quotaUsage** to handle **usage limits**: detect approaching the cap or exceeding it, and show limitIncreaseSuggestion to guide the user.

audience_en: **Developers who want to use more powerful models in their apps while balancing privacy**, especially in scenarios needing large context or deep reasoning.

title: Explore immersive website environments in visionOS
gloss: 探索 visionOS 的沉浸式網站環境
takeaway: 用 JavaScript 的新 Immersive API 搭配 model 元素，把網站訪客帶進 Apple Vision Pro 的虛擬環境中。
chapters: Adding the environment model on the page for inline preview
Request the immersive transition on the model
Update the entity transform and the layout on immersive state updates
Request an immersive transition on the escape room model
Handle the request result and show a loading animation
Dock the video in the environment with the fullscreen API

points.text: JavaScript 的新 **Immersive API** 可把網站訪客**帶進 Apple Vision Pro 的虛擬環境**中。
用 **<model>** 元素搭配 **environmentmap** 載入環境，先在頁面內做**內嵌預覽（inline preview）**。
透過 **entityTransform** 與 **DOMMatrix** 調整模型位置與座位視角，打造合適的眼平視角。
用 **document.immersiveEnabled** 偵測可用性，呼叫 **requestImmersive** 切換沉浸狀態，並監聽 **immersivechange** 更新版面。
最佳化體驗：用 **usdcrush** 壓縮 USDZ、用 fullscreen API 嵌入影片，並控制載入動畫與影像。

audience: **想為 Vision Pro 打造沉浸式網頁體驗**、在網站中嵌入 3D 環境的網頁開發者。
gloss_en: Explore immersive website environments in visionOS
takeaway_en: Use JavaScript's new Immersive API together with the model element to transport website visitors into virtual environments on Apple Vision Pro.

points_en.text: JavaScript's new **Immersive API** can **transport website visitors into virtual environments** on Apple Vision Pro.
Use the **<model>** element with **environmentmap** to load an environment, starting with an **inline preview** within the page.
Adjust the model's position and seated viewing angle via **entityTransform** and **DOMMatrix** to create an appropriate eye-level perspective.
Detect availability with **document.immersiveEnabled**, call **requestImmersive** to toggle the immersive state, and listen for **immersivechange** to update the layout.
Optimize the experience: compress USDZ with **usdcrush**, embed video with the fullscreen API, and control loading animations and images.

audience_en: Web developers who **want to build immersive web experiences for Vision Pro** and embed 3D environments in their websites.

title: Dive into lazy stacks and scrolling with SwiftUI
gloss: 深入 SwiftUI 的 lazy stacks 與捲動
takeaway: 理解 LazyVStack／LazyHStack 如何估算尺寸與延遲載入子視圖，並善用 scroll transition、prefetch 與程式化捲動打造流暢的捲動體驗。
chapters: Setting up lazy stack subview in onAppear
Lazy stack subview ready before onAppear
Using onGeometryChange in lazy stack subview
Using custom layout in lazy stack subview

points.text: 深入解析 **LazyVStack** 與 **LazyHStack** 如何估算尺寸並延遲載入子視圖，是流暢捲動的關鍵。
建議**在資料層而非視圖層做過濾**（例如以 @Query 的 #Predicate），避免子視圖數量在出現後才改變。
用 **scrollTransition** 製作捲動特效，並以 **onScrollGeometryChange** 與 **onScrollTargetVisibilityChange** 觀測捲動狀態。
在 **initializer** 而非 onAppear 設定子視圖狀態與載入工作，可在出現前就準備好內容、減少跳動。
透過 **ScrollPosition** 搭配 scrollTo 做程式化捲動，並避免在視圖出現後改變版面。

audience: 適合**已熟悉 SwiftUI、想深入優化長列表與捲動效能的開發者**。
gloss_en: Dive into lazy stacks and scrolling with SwiftUI
takeaway_en: Understand how LazyVStack / LazyHStack estimate sizes and lazily load subviews, and make good use of scroll transitions, prefetching, and programmatic scrolling to build a smooth scrolling experience.

points_en.text: A deep dive into how **LazyVStack** and **LazyHStack** estimate sizes and lazily load subviews—the key to smooth scrolling.
Recommends **filtering at the data layer rather than the view layer** (for example with @Query's #Predicate) to avoid the subview count changing after they appear.
Use **scrollTransition** for scroll effects, and observe scroll state with **onScrollGeometryChange** and **onScrollTargetVisibilityChange**.
Set subview state and kick off loading work in the **initializer** rather than onAppear, so content is ready before it appears and there's less jumping.
Do programmatic scrolling with **ScrollPosition** and scrollTo, and avoid changing layout after a view appears.

audience_en: **Developers already familiar with SwiftUI who want to dig deeper into optimizing long lists and scrolling performance.**

title: Compose advanced graphics effects with SwiftUI
gloss: 用 SwiftUI 組合進階圖形效果
takeaway: 結合 SwiftUI 的 layerEffect、Metal shader 與 TimelineView、對齊指南等版面 API，把複雜視覺拆解成可組合、可動畫的圖形效果。
chapters: Writing layer effect shader in Metal
SwiftUI layer effect with offset parameter
SwiftUI layer effect with full-width offset
SwiftUI layer effect with noise sampling
SwiftUI layer effect with static visual
SwiftUI layer effect with animated visual

points.text: 示範如何把設計**拆解（design breakdown）**成可組合的 SwiftUI 版面與圖形 API。
以 **layerEffect** 搭配 Metal 的 `[[stitchable]]` shader 套用自訂效果（如背景扭曲）。
透過 noise texture 取樣與 **domain warping** 在 shader 中產生豐富的視覺變化。
用 **TimelineView(.animation)** 把經過時間傳入 shader，驅動動畫化的視覺。
以 **ScrollViewReader** 做時間同步逐字稿，並用 **alignmentGuide** 讓時間戳浮動對齊。

audience: **想為 SwiftUI App 打造客製化視覺與動畫效果的開發者**，對 shader 與圖形組合有興趣的人。
gloss_en: Compose advanced graphics effects with SwiftUI
takeaway_en: Combine SwiftUI's layerEffect, Metal shaders, and layout APIs like TimelineView and alignment guides to break complex visuals down into composable, animatable graphics effects.

points_en.text: Demonstrates how to do a **design breakdown** into composable SwiftUI layout and graphics APIs.
Apply custom effects (such as background distortion) using **layerEffect** paired with Metal's `[[stitchable]]` shaders.
Produce rich visual variation in the shader through noise texture sampling and **domain warping**.
Use **TimelineView(.animation)** to pass elapsed time into a shader, driving animated visuals.
Build a time-synced transcript with **ScrollViewReader**, and use **alignmentGuide** to float the timestamps into alignment.

audience_en: **Developers who want to craft custom visuals and animation effects for their SwiftUI apps** and are interested in shaders and graphics composition.

title: Meet Core AI
gloss: 認識 Core AI
takeaway: Core AI 是 Apple 全新的裝置端 AI 模型部署框架，從 PyTorch 轉檔到 Swift 推論一條龍。
chapters: Convert a PyTorch model to Core AI
Input features for the snake model
Add KV cache buffers to PyTorch module
Update forward pass to read/write KV caches
Store KV cache NDArrays in ModelPlayer
Pass state views to inference function

points.text: **Core AI** 是 Apple 全新的裝置端 AI 模型部署框架，涵蓋從轉檔、整合到推論的完整生態。
用 Python 的 **coreai_torch.TorchConverter** 把 PyTorch 模型轉成 **.aimodel** 資產，並可驗證轉檔前後的數值一致性。
App 端以 **AIModel** 載入模型、**InferenceFunction** 取得推論函式，並用 **NDArray** 餵入與取出資料。
為 Transformer 加上 **KV cache** 狀態並重新轉檔，可顯著優化逐 token 的推論效能。
透過 **AIModelCache** 檢查快取並用 **AIModel.specialize** 預先特化模型，搭配 Instruments 進行效能剖析。

audience: 想把 **PyTorch 模型部署到 Apple 裝置端執行**、追求效能與低延遲的 ML 與 App 開發者。
gloss_en: Meet Core AI
takeaway_en: Core AI is Apple's new on-device AI model deployment framework, end to end from PyTorch conversion to Swift inference.

points_en.text: **Core AI** is Apple's new on-device AI model deployment framework, covering the full ecosystem from conversion to integration to inference.
Use Python's **coreai_torch.TorchConverter** to convert PyTorch models into **.aimodel** assets, and verify numerical consistency before and after conversion.
On the app side, load the model with **AIModel**, get the inference function with **InferenceFunction**, and feed data in and out with **NDArray**.
Adding **KV cache** state to a Transformer and re-converting can significantly optimize per-token inference performance.
Inspect the cache with **AIModelCache** and pre-specialize models with **AIModel.specialize**, profiling performance with Instruments.

audience_en: ML and app developers **who want to deploy PyTorch models to run on-device on Apple platforms** and care about performance and low latency.

title: Dive into Core AI model authoring and optimization
gloss: 深入 Core AI 模型編寫與最佳化
takeaway: 用全新的 Core AI 框架走完自訂模型部署流程:從 PyTorch 轉換、最佳化、除錯,到寫自訂 Metal kernel 與重新編寫模型,部署到 Apple silicon。
chapters: Convert, optimize and run inference with Core AI
Define a SiLU Metal kernel with PyTorch reference
Use a custom Metal kernel and convert with TorchConverter

points.text: 全新 **Core AI 框架**提供 Apple silicon 上**完整的自訂模型部署工作流**。
**Python 工作流**:用 torch.export 匯出模型,再以 coreai_torch.TorchConverter 轉成 Core AI 並 optimize()、存成 .aimodel。
在裝置端以 **AIModel.load 載入 .aimodel**、load_function 取得函式並執行 inference(NDArray 輸入)。
提供 **Core AI Debugger** 協助檢視與診斷模型,並有 model optimization 段落講最佳化技巧。
進階可寫**自訂 Metal kernel(TorchMetalKernel,如 fused SiLU)**,經 register_custom_kernels 把 MSL 整合進 asset,並支援 model re-authoring。

audience: **要把自訂機器學習模型最佳化並部署到 Apple silicon、熟悉 PyTorch 的 ML 工程師。**
gloss_en: Dive into Core AI model authoring and optimization
takeaway_en: Walk through the full custom model deployment workflow with the new Core AI framework: from PyTorch conversion, optimization, and debugging to writing custom Metal kernels and re-authoring models, deployed to Apple silicon.

points_en.text: The new **Core AI framework** provides a **complete custom model deployment workflow** on Apple silicon.
**Python workflow**: export the model with torch.export, then convert it to Core AI with coreai_torch.TorchConverter, optimize(), and save as .aimodel.
On device, **load the .aimodel with AIModel.load**, get a function with load_function, and run inference (with NDArray inputs).
Provides the **Core AI Debugger** to help inspect and diagnose models, plus a model optimization section covering optimization techniques.
For advanced cases, write a **custom Metal kernel (TorchMetalKernel, such as a fused SiLU)**, integrate the MSL into the asset via register_custom_kernels, and support model re-authoring.

audience_en: **ML engineers familiar with PyTorch who need to optimize and deploy custom machine learning models to Apple silicon.**

title: Integrate on-device AI models into your app using Core AI
gloss: 用 Core AI 把裝置端 AI 模型整合進你的 App
takeaway: 用 Core AI 取得並執行一系列為 Apple silicon 最佳化的開源模型（如 Qwen、Mistral、SAM3），透過 FoundationModels 介面在裝置端推論，並用 AOT 編譯加速部署。
chapters: Getting models with the Core AI models repository
Load and run SAM3 image segmentation
Load a language model and create a session
Compile a Core AI model ahead of time

points.text: **Core AI** 提供一系列為 **Apple silicon 最佳化的開源模型**（Qwen、Mistral、SAM3 等），可透過 Core AI models repository 取得。
影像分割用 `CoreAIImageSegmenter`（SAM3）以文字 prompt 取得遮罩；語言模型用 `CoreAILanguageModel` 建立 `LanguageModelSession`。
Core AI 語言模型可直接搭配 **`FoundationModels` 的 `@Generable`** 產生結構化輸出，重用既有的 Foundation Models API。
可用 **AOT（ahead-of-time）編譯**（`xcrun coreai-build compile`）預先編譯模型以降低特化延遲，並支援跨平台部署。

audience: **想在裝置端整合開源大型語言模型或視覺模型、又希望沿用 Foundation Models 開發體驗的開發者**。
gloss_en: Integrate on-device AI models with Core AI
takeaway_en: Use Core AI to obtain and run a collection of open-source models optimized for Apple silicon (such as Qwen, Mistral, SAM3), inferring on-device through the FoundationModels interface and accelerating deployment with AOT compilation.

points_en.text: **Core AI** offers a collection of **open-source models optimized for Apple silicon** (Qwen, Mistral, SAM3, and more), available through the Core AI models repository.
For image segmentation, use `CoreAIImageSegmenter` (SAM3) to obtain masks from a text prompt; for language models, use `CoreAILanguageModel` to create a `LanguageModelSession`.
Core AI language models work directly with **`FoundationModels`' `@Generable`** to produce structured output, reusing your existing Foundation Models API.
Use **AOT (ahead-of-time) compilation** (`xcrun coreai-build compile`) to precompile models and reduce specialization latency, with support for cross-platform deployment.

audience_en: **Developers who want to integrate open-source large language or vision models on-device while keeping the Foundation Models development experience**.

title: Explore numerical computing in Swift with MLX
gloss: 用 MLX 探索 Swift 的數值計算
takeaway: **MLX Swift** 把 NumPy 風格的陣列運算原生帶進 Swift，消除機器學習開發的跨語言摩擦並善用 Apple 晶片。
chapters: MLX Swift and the Apple ecosystem
The full MLX toolkit and ecosystem

points.text: **MLX Swift** 提供 NumPy 風格的 `MLXArray` 與向量化運算，讓數值計算原生寫在 Swift 裡。
以 Mandelbrot 為例，展示從 scalar 逐點迴圈改寫成**陣列式（array）**運算的巨大簡化與加速。
用 `conv2d` 做 Jacobi 迭代解熱傳導，再以 **SOR（Successive Over-Relaxation）** 加速收斂。
透過 **自動微分（`grad`）** 進行曲線擬合，以梯度下降更新參數。
MLX 採**延遲求值**，需以 `eval()` 強制計算，並串接完整的 MLX 工具鏈與生態系。

audience: **想在 Swift 中做數值計算或機器學習**、需善用 Apple 晶片的開發者與研究者。
gloss_en: Explore numerical computing in Swift with MLX
takeaway_en: **MLX Swift** brings NumPy-style array computing natively to Swift, eliminating cross-language friction in machine learning development and making full use of Apple silicon.

points_en.text: **MLX Swift** provides a NumPy-style `MLXArray` and vectorized operations, letting you write numerical computing natively in Swift.
Using Mandelbrot as an example, shows the dramatic simplification and speedup of rewriting a scalar point-by-point loop into **array** operations.
Solve heat conduction with Jacobi iteration using `conv2d`, then accelerate convergence with **SOR (Successive Over-Relaxation)**.
Perform curve fitting via **automatic differentiation (`grad`)**, updating parameters with gradient descent.
MLX uses **lazy evaluation**, requiring `eval()` to force computation, and connects to the full MLX toolchain and ecosystem.

audience_en: Developers and researchers who want to **do numerical computing or machine learning in Swift** while making full use of Apple silicon.

title: Optimize custom machine learning operations with Metal tensors
gloss: 用 Metal tensors 最佳化自訂機器學習運算
takeaway: 運用 Metal Tensor API 與 MPP Tensor Ops，以量化張量與 cooperative tensor 打造高效能的自訂 ML 運算核心。
chapters: Declare a multi-plane tensor with scale factors
MSL type aliases for an MXFP8 tensor handle
Declare an inline MXFP8 tensor on the stack
Slice tensors and run a quantized matmul
Reuse cooperative tensor as matmul input
Integrating custom ops into Core AI

points.text: 介紹 Apple 的 ML 軟體堆疊，並說明 **Metal Tensor API** 與 MPP Tensor Ops 的定位。
用 **MTLTensor** 搭配量化資料型別（如 MetalFloat8E4M3）管理量化資料。
透過 **auxiliary plane** 宣告帶 scale factors 的 multi-plane tensor，支援 MXFP8 區塊量化。
以 **matmul2d** 執行量化矩陣乘法，TensorOps 會自動處理反量化。
用 **cooperative tensor** 與 map_iterator 打造 SoftMax 等進階運算，並可整合進 Core AI。

audience: 撰寫 **自訂 Metal ML 核心或高效能推論運算** 的進階圖形與機器學習開發者。
gloss_en: Optimize custom machine learning operations with Metal tensors
takeaway_en: Use the Metal Tensor API and MPP Tensor Ops with quantized tensors and cooperative tensors to build high-performance custom ML compute kernels.

points_en.text: Introduces Apple's ML software stack and explains where the **Metal Tensor API** and MPP Tensor Ops fit in.
Use **MTLTensor** with quantized data types (such as MetalFloat8E4M3) to manage quantized data.
Declare a multi-plane tensor with scale factors via an **auxiliary plane** to support MXFP8 block quantization.
Use **matmul2d** to perform quantized matrix multiplication; TensorOps handles dequantization automatically.
Use a **cooperative tensor** with map_iterator to build advanced operations like SoftMax, and integrate them into Core AI.

audience_en: Advanced graphics and machine learning developers writing **custom Metal ML kernels or high-performance inference operations**.

title: Build AI-powered scripts with the fm CLI and Python SDK
gloss: 用 fm CLI 與 Python SDK 打造 AI 腳本
takeaway: macOS 上新的 fm 命令列工具與 Foundation Models Python SDK，讓你在腳本與 Python 中使用裝置端／PCC 模型，支援結構化輸出、工具呼叫與評估流程。
chapters: Introducing the fm CLI and Python SDK
Prompt the on-device model with fm respond
Sort files with fm respond and a schema
Install the Foundation Models Python SDK
Prompting, tool calling and guided generation
Create a session and respond to a prompt
Define a Tool for the language model
Building an evaluation pipeline in Python

points.text: 新的 **fm CLI** 可用 `fm respond` 直接在終端機提示模型，支援 `--model pcc`、`--image` 影像輸入與 `--schema` 結構化輸出。
可結合 **fm schema** 與 jq 撰寫 shell 腳本，例如自動**分類與整理檔案**（final 與 draft）。
**Foundation Models Python SDK**（pip install apple_fm_sdk）提供 LanguageModelSession，可在 Python 中提示模型。
Python 中以 **fm.Tool** 定義工具、用 **@fm.generable** 與 fm.guide 產生結構化輸出，並可建構評估管線。

audience: **想在 macOS 腳本或 Python 中整合 Apple Foundation Models** 的開發者與自動化工作流程使用者。
gloss_en: Build AI-powered scripts with the fm CLI and Python SDK
takeaway_en: The new fm command-line tool and Foundation Models Python SDK on macOS let you use on-device/PCC models in scripts and Python, with support for structured output, tool calling, and evaluation flows.

points_en.text: The new **fm CLI** lets you prompt the model directly in the terminal with `fm respond`, supporting `--model pcc`, `--image` image input, and `--schema` structured output.
Combine **fm schema** with jq to write shell scripts, for example to automatically **classify and organize files** (final and draft).
The **Foundation Models Python SDK** (pip install apple_fm_sdk) provides LanguageModelSession to prompt the model from Python.
In Python, define tools with **fm.Tool**, produce structured output with **@fm.generable** and fm.guide, and build evaluation pipelines.

audience_en: **Developers and automation-workflow users who want to integrate Apple Foundation Models into macOS scripts or Python.**

title: Improve your prompts by hill-climbing with Evaluations
gloss: 用評估爬坡法改進你的提示詞
takeaway: 用比較式評估（Evaluation）為提示詞建立基準、以 Cohen's kappa 校準模型評審與人類，再逐步迭代改進提示與選擇模型。
chapters: The alignment dataset, extracted to JSON
The judge alignment evaluation: dataset, subject, evaluator
Few-shot worked examples in the judge prompt
Adding few-shot examples to the judge
Compare with/without the tool in one suite
Going beyond prompts: adding a tool

points.text: 用**比較式評估（Evaluation）**搭配 **ScoreDimension** 與 **ModelJudgeEvaluator** 為提示詞建立可量化基準，逐步**爬坡（hill-climbing）**改進。
以 **Cohen's kappa** 量測模型評審與人類專家之間的**漂移（drift）**，並用對齊資料集校準評審提示。
用 **.evaluates** 把評估包進 **Swift Testing** 套件，以 **#expect** 設定對齊門檻並做校準測試。
比較控制組與實驗組的評審提示，並透過**少樣本範例（few-shot examples）**精修評分維度。
超越單純調提示：為 **BookTaggingService** 加入 **BookLookupTool**（Tool 協定），在同一套件中比較有無工具的差異。

audience: **用 Foundation Models 開發功能、想系統化評估與改進提示詞**並挑選合適模型的開發者。
gloss_en: Improve your prompts by hill-climbing with Evaluations
takeaway_en: Use comparative Evaluation to baseline your prompts, calibrate the model judge against humans with Cohen's kappa, then iteratively improve prompts and select models.

points_en.text: Use **comparative Evaluation** with **ScoreDimension** and **ModelJudgeEvaluator** to build a quantifiable baseline for your prompts and improve them step by step through **hill-climbing**.
Measure the **drift** between the model judge and human experts with **Cohen's kappa**, and calibrate the judge prompt using an alignment dataset.
Use **.evaluates** to wrap evaluations into a **Swift Testing** suite, setting alignment thresholds and running calibration tests with **#expect**.
Compare control and experimental judge prompts, and refine score dimensions with **few-shot examples**.
Go beyond simply tuning prompts: add a **BookLookupTool** (Tool protocol) to **BookTaggingService**, and compare results with and without the tool in the same suite.

audience_en: Developers **building features with Foundation Models who want to systematically evaluate and improve their prompts** and pick the right model.

title: Build live production tools for Apple Immersive Video
gloss: 為 Apple Immersive Video 打造直播製作工具
takeaway: 了解如何封裝沉浸式影片、空間音訊與場景中繼資料，並透過即時媒體傳輸與 VideoToolbox 壓縮設定打造 Apple Immersive Video 的直播製作流程。
chapters: Set compression properties for vexu metadata

points.text: 概覽 **Apple Immersive Video** 的直播製作流程，並說明沉浸式直播與一般直播的差異。
介紹沉浸式直播格式，整合沉浸式影片、**spatial audio** 與場景中繼資料。
說明 **real-time media transport** 以及錄製與播放的處理方式。
透過 **VideoToolbox** 設定壓縮屬性 **kVTCompressionPropertyKey_ProjectionKind** 為 AppleImmersiveVideo 來寫入 vexu 中繼資料。

audience: 適合**從事沉浸式影片直播製作、需要封裝與傳輸 Apple Immersive Video 的開發者與工程團隊**。
gloss_en: Build live production tools for Apple Immersive Video
takeaway_en: Learn how to package immersive video, spatial audio, and scene metadata, and build a live production workflow for Apple Immersive Video using real-time media transport and VideoToolbox compression settings.

points_en.text: Overviews the live production workflow for **Apple Immersive Video** and explains how immersive live broadcasts differ from ordinary ones.
Introduces the immersive live format, combining immersive video, **spatial audio**, and scene metadata.
Explains **real-time media transport** and how recording and playback are handled.
Write vexu metadata by setting the **VideoToolbox** compression property **kVTCompressionPropertyKey_ProjectionKind** to AppleImmersiveVideo.

audience_en: **Developers and engineering teams working on immersive video live production who need to package and transport Apple Immersive Video.**

title: Bring an LLM provider to the Foundation Models framework
gloss: 把 LLM 供應商接入 Foundation Models 框架
takeaway: 實作 LanguageModel 與 LanguageModelExecutor，把自家或開源 LLM 接入 Foundation Models，串流 token、對應 Transcript、處理錯誤並支援自訂段落與伺服器端工具。
chapters: Configure Package.swift for your model package
Manage model resources with prewarm and respond
Map Transcript entries to model messages
Read generation and context options from the request
Stream tokens and metadata through the channel
Honor the developer's intent or throw
Built-in errors that any model can throw
Handle errors from your model executor
Define and use custom Transcript segments
Implement server-side tools in your model

points.text: 可選擇多種模型來源：on-device、**Private Cloud Compute**、Core AI 或從 HuggingFace 來的開源 **MLX** 模型。
透過實作 **LanguageModel** 與 **LanguageModelExecutor** 協定，把新模型接入 Foundation Models 框架。
以 **prewarm／respond** 管理模型資源，並把 **Transcript** 條目對應成模型訊息。
透過 channel **串流 token 與 metadata**，回報用量；無法滿足需求時拋出 **LanguageModelError**。
支援**自訂 Transcript 段落**與**伺服器端工具**（如 web search），擴充回應內容。

audience: **想把自家或第三方 LLM 整合進 Apple Foundation Models 框架的開發者與模型供應商**。
gloss_en: Bring an LLM provider to the Foundation Models framework
takeaway_en: Implement LanguageModel and LanguageModelExecutor to bring your own or open-source LLMs into Foundation Models, streaming tokens, mapping the Transcript, handling errors, and supporting custom segments and server-side tools.

points_en.text: Choose from multiple model sources: on-device, **Private Cloud Compute**, Core AI, or open-source **MLX** models from HuggingFace.
Bring new models into the Foundation Models framework by implementing the **LanguageModel** and **LanguageModelExecutor** protocols.
Manage model resources with **prewarm / respond**, and map **Transcript** entries into model messages.
**Stream tokens and metadata** through a channel and report usage; throw a **LanguageModelError** when a request can't be satisfied.
Support **custom Transcript segments** and **server-side tools** (such as web search) to extend response content.

audience_en: **Developers and model providers who want to integrate their own or third-party LLMs into Apple's Foundation Models framework**.

title: Support the Center Stage front camera in your iOS app
gloss: 在 iOS App 中支援人物居中前置鏡頭
takeaway: 用 AVCapture 的動態長寬比與智慧取景 API，讓你的相機 App 支援 iPhone 17 等機型的 Center Stage 前置鏡頭。
chapters: Support Center Stage for video calls

points.text: 在 iPhone 17、iPhone 17 Pro 與 iPhone Air 上，以 **builtInUltraWideCamera** 前置鏡頭支援 Center Stage 拍照。
用 **supportedDynamicAspectRatios** 與 **setDynamicAspectRatio** 在拍攝中切換 4:3 等**動態長寬比**。
透過 **smartFramingMonitor** 觀察 **recommendedFraming**，自動調整長寬比與 **videoZoomFactor** 完成智慧取景。
需處理**感光元件方向補償（sensor orientation compensation）**，確保畫面方向正確。
錄影與視訊通話情境可用 **centerStageControlMode = .cooperative** 與 **isCenterStageEnabled** 開啟 Center Stage。

audience: 開發 **iOS 相機或視訊 App、想支援前置鏡頭 Center Stage 與智慧取景**的開發者。
gloss_en: Support the Center Stage front camera in your iOS app
takeaway_en: Use AVCapture's dynamic aspect ratio and smart framing APIs to support the Center Stage front camera on devices like iPhone 17 in your camera app.

points_en.text: On iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Pro, and iPhone Air, support Center Stage photo capture with the **builtInUltraWideCamera** front camera.
Use **supportedDynamicAspectRatios** and **setDynamicAspectRatio** to switch **dynamic aspect ratios** like 4:3 during capture.
Observe **recommendedFraming** via **smartFramingMonitor** to automatically adjust the aspect ratio and **videoZoomFactor** for smart framing.
Handle **sensor orientation compensation** to ensure the image is oriented correctly.
For video recording and video calling, enable Center Stage with **centerStageControlMode = .cooperative** and **isCenterStageEnabled**.

audience_en: Developers building **iOS camera or video apps who want to support front-camera Center Stage and smart framing**.

title: Explore advanced App Intents features for Siri and Apple Intelligence
gloss: 探索 Siri 與 Apple Intelligence 的進階 App Intents 功能
takeaway: 用進階 App Intents 打磨與 Siri/Apple Intelligence 的整合:自訂對話與澄清提問、視覺片段回應、互動捐贈、語意索引、結構化搜尋與螢幕內容感知。
chapters: Ask a clarifying question within an inten
Re-run Siri search in your app

points.text: 自訂 Siri 回應:用 **ProvidesDialog 的 IntentDialog** 給出完整/簡短對話,並可用 **$param.requestValue** 在 intent 中向使用者**反問澄清問題**。
視覺回應:強化 **DisplayRepresentation**(title/subtitle/image),並以 **ShowsSnippetView** 回傳自訂 snippet 視圖。
用 **IntentDonationManager.donate** 捐贈互動(含參數與結果),讓 Siri 學習使用者偏好。
語意整合:用 **IndexedEntity + CSSearchableIndex** 建語意索引,用 **IntentValueQuery** 做結構化搜尋,並以 .system.searchInApp 把 Siri 搜尋導回 App 內。
**螢幕內容感知(onscreen awareness)**:用 **EntityIdentifier / appEntityIdentifier** 在 NSUserActivity、視圖、清單、通知、Now Playing、AlarmKit 等處標註螢幕上的實體。

audience: **已導入 App Intents、想把 Siri 與 Apple Intelligence 整合做到更深(澄清提問、語意索引、螢幕感知)的開發者。**
gloss_en: Explore advanced App Intents features for Siri and Apple Intelligence
takeaway_en: Use advanced App Intents to polish your Siri/Apple Intelligence integration: custom dialog and clarifying questions, visual snippet responses, interaction donations, semantic indexing, structured search, and onscreen awareness.

points_en.text: Customize Siri responses: use **ProvidesDialog's IntentDialog** to give full/short dialog, and use **$param.requestValue** to **ask the user a clarifying question** within the intent.
Visual responses: enhance **DisplayRepresentation** (title/subtitle/image), and return a custom snippet view with **ShowsSnippetView**.
Use **IntentDonationManager.donate** to donate interactions (including parameters and results) so Siri learns user preferences.

Semantic integration: build a semantic index with **IndexedEntity + CSSearchableIndex**, do structured search with **IntentValueQuery**, and route Siri search back into your app with .system.searchInApp.
**Onscreen awareness**: use **EntityIdentifier / appEntityIdentifier** to annotate onscreen entities across NSUserActivity, views, lists, notifications, Now Playing, AlarmKit, and more.

audience_en: **Developers who have already adopted App Intents and want to deepen their Siri and Apple Intelligence integration (clarifying questions, semantic indexing, onscreen awareness).**

title: Code-along: Make your app available to Siri
gloss: 程式碼實作：讓你的 App 可被 Siri 使用
takeaway: 跟著 Xcode 專案一步步採用 App Schemas 與 App Intents，建立日曆、出席者與事件等 entity，讓使用者能用 Siri 開啟、建立、更新與刪除事件。

points.text: 這是一場 **code-along**，跟著實際 Xcode 專案採用 **App Schemas**，讓 App 的功能可被 Siri 觸發。
逐步建立 **CalendarEntity、AttendeeEntity 與 EventEntity** 等 App Intents entity，作為 Siri 操作的資料模型。
示範用 **OpenIntent 開啟事件**並加入**畫面感知（onscreen awareness）**，讓 Siri 理解使用者當下看到的內容。
完整涵蓋以 Siri **建立、更新與刪除事件**的流程，並加入**自訂 snippet view** 呈現結果。

audience: **想讓 App 深度整合 Siri、跟著動手實作 App Intents 與 App Schemas 的開發者**。
gloss_en: Code-along: Make your app available to Siri
takeaway_en: Follow along in an Xcode project to adopt App Schemas and App Intents step by step, creating calendar, attendee, and event entities so users can open, create, update, and delete events with Siri.

points_en.text: This is a **code-along** that follows a real Xcode project to adopt **App Schemas**, making your app's features available to Siri.
Builds App Intents entities step by step, including **CalendarEntity, AttendeeEntity, and EventEntity**, as the data model for Siri operations.
Demonstrates using **OpenIntent to open an event** and adding **onscreen awareness** so Siri understands what the user is currently looking at.
Fully covers **creating, updating, and deleting events** with Siri, and adds a **custom snippet view** to present the results.

audience_en: **Developers who want deep Siri integration and want to follow along implementing App Intents and App Schemas hands-on**.

title: Discover new capabilities in the App Intents framework
gloss: 探索 App Intents 框架的新能力
takeaway: App Intents 新增 **ValueRepresentation、EntityCollection、SyncableEntity、LongRunningIntent 與 ExecutionTargets**，讓 intent 更快、更彈性也更貼近情境。
chapters: Share entities across apps with ValueRepresentation
Handle large entity sets with EntityCollection
Use entities across devices with SyncableEntity
Make entity IDs stable with SyncableEntity
Run beyond 30 s with LongRunningIntent + CancellableIntent
Target the right process with ExecutionTargets
Control which process runs your intent with ExecutionTargets

points.text: 用 **`ValueRepresentation`** 分享結構化實體（如以 `PlaceDescriptor` 表示地點），可用 key-path 大幅減少程式碼。
以 **`EntityCollection`** 取代 `[Entity]` 高效處理大量實體，只在需要時取用識別碼。
透過 **`SyncableEntity`** 與 `SyncableEntityIdentifier` 讓實體 ID 跨裝置穩定一致。
用 `LongRunningIntent` 搭配 `CancellableIntent` 讓 intent 執行**超過 30 秒**並回報進度、可取消。
以 **`ExecutionTargets`** 指定 intent 執行於主 App、App Intents extension 或 widget extension。

audience: **已採用 App Intents、想用進階功能提升彈性與效能**的 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Discover new capabilities in the App Intents framework
takeaway_en: App Intents adds **ValueRepresentation, EntityCollection, SyncableEntity, LongRunningIntent, and ExecutionTargets**, making intents faster, more flexible, and more relevant.

points_en.text: Use **`ValueRepresentation`** to share structured entities (such as representing a place with `PlaceDescriptor`), with key paths to greatly reduce code.
Use **`EntityCollection`** instead of `[Entity]` to efficiently handle large numbers of entities, fetching identifiers only when needed.
Keep entity IDs stable and consistent across devices with **`SyncableEntity`** and `SyncableEntityIdentifier`.
Use `LongRunningIntent` with `CancellableIntent` to let an intent run **longer than 30 seconds** while reporting progress and being cancellable.
Use **`ExecutionTargets`** to specify whether an intent runs in the main app, an App Intents extension, or a widget extension.

audience_en: iOS developers who **have already adopted App Intents and want to use advanced features to improve flexibility and performance**.

title: Secure your app: mitigate risks to agentic features
gloss: 保護你的 App：降低 agentic 功能的風險
takeaway: 針對間接提示注入進行威脅建模，並用工具確認、spotlighting、redaction 與 App Intents 驗證政策來保護 agentic 功能。

points.text: 解析 **間接提示注入（indirect prompt injection）** 帶來的資料外洩與非預期行為風險。
以 **威脅建模** 區分高風險工具（如有財務影響的下單）與會回傳不可信資料的工具。
用 **onToolCall** 在執行高風險工具前要求使用者確認，避免未授權動作。
透過 **historyTransform** 對不可信工具輸出做 spotlighting 標記與 PII redaction。
為 App Intents 設定 **authenticationPolicy（.requiresAuthentication）**，保護刪除等敏感操作。

audience: 正在 App 中加入 **LLM 工具呼叫或 agentic 功能**、需要把關安全性的開發者。
gloss_en: Secure your app: mitigate risks to agentic features
takeaway_en: Threat-model indirect prompt injection and protect agentic features with tool confirmation, spotlighting, redaction, and App Intents authentication policies.

points_en.text: Breaks down the data-exfiltration and unintended-action risks posed by **indirect prompt injection**.
Use **threat modeling** to distinguish high-risk tools (such as placing an order with financial impact) from tools that return untrusted data.
Use **onToolCall** to require user confirmation before running high-risk tools, preventing unauthorized actions.
Use **historyTransform** to apply spotlighting tags and PII redaction to untrusted tool output.
Set an **authenticationPolicy (.requiresAuthentication)** for App Intents to protect sensitive operations like deletion.

audience_en: Developers adding **LLM tool calls or agentic features** to their app who need to enforce security.

title: Bringing Cyberpunk 2077 to Mac
gloss: 將《電馭叛客 2077》帶上 Mac
takeaway: CD PROJEKT RED 分享如何運用 Game Porting Toolkit 將《電馭叛客 2077》移植到 macOS，並透過「For this Mac」預設樹立 AAA 遊戲新標竿。
chapters: How we brought it to Mac
What we did to stand out

points.text: **CD PROJEKT RED** 分享將 AAA 大作《電馭叛客 2077》移植至 **macOS** 的幕後歷程與決策。
說明**為何要登上 Mac**，以及整體的移植策略與工程流程。
使用 **Game Porting Toolkit** 進行可行性評估，加速從 Windows 到 Mac 的移植。
推出 **「For this Mac」預設**，依機型自動最佳化畫質設定，做出與眾不同的體驗。

audience: **遊戲開發者與想將大型遊戲移植到 macOS** 的工作室，特別是關注 AAA 等級效能與最佳化者。
gloss_en: Bringing Cyberpunk 2077 to Mac
takeaway_en: CD PROJEKT RED shares how they used the Game Porting Toolkit to bring Cyberpunk 2077 to macOS, setting a new bar for AAA gaming with the "For this Mac" preset.

points_en.text: **CD PROJEKT RED** shares the behind-the-scenes story and decisions of porting the AAA blockbuster Cyberpunk 2077 to **macOS**.
Explains **why bring it to the Mac**, along with the overall porting strategy and engineering process.
Uses the **Game Porting Toolkit** for feasibility assessment, accelerating the port from Windows to Mac.
Introduces the **"For this Mac" preset**, which automatically optimizes graphics settings per model to deliver a distinctive experience.

audience_en: **Game developers and studios looking to port large games to macOS**, especially those focused on AAA-class performance and optimization.

title: Speedrun your game port with agentic coding
gloss: 用代理式編碼加速遊戲移植
takeaway: 用 Game Porting Toolkit 4 的新代理式技能，大幅加速把遊戲移植到 Apple 平台，並把 D3D12 對應到 Metal 4。
chapters: Map D3D12 states to Metal 4 stages

points.text: **Game Porting Toolkit 4** 新增**代理式技能（agentic skills）**，可大幅加速遊戲移植到 Apple 平台的歷程。
透過 **/plugin** 安裝 game-porting-skills，並導入移植助理工作流程，處理視窗化與**影格節奏（frame pacing）**。
用 **Metal 4** 算繪場景：登錄資源 residency、查詢 argument buffer 位移，並把 **D3D12** 狀態對應到 Metal 4 階段。
用 **IRShaderReflection** 查詢著色器參數數量，並借助 GPU 命令列工具除錯。
整合遊戲控制器與 **MetalFX**，完善移植後的輸入與升頻體驗。

audience: **要把 Windows/D3D12 遊戲移植到 Apple 平台**、想用 AI 代理加速移植與 Metal 4 轉換的遊戲開發者。
gloss_en: Speedrun your game port with agentic coding
takeaway_en: Use the new agentic skills in Game Porting Toolkit 4 to dramatically accelerate porting your game to Apple platforms, and map D3D12 to Metal 4.

points_en.text: **Game Porting Toolkit 4** adds **agentic skills** that can dramatically accelerate the journey of porting games to Apple platforms.
Install game-porting-skills via **/plugin** and adopt the porting-assistant workflow to handle windowing and **frame pacing**.
Render scenes with **Metal 4**: register resource residency, query argument buffer offsets, and map **D3D12** state to Metal 4 stages.
Use **IRShaderReflection** to query shader parameter counts, and debug with the help of GPU command-line tools.
Integrate game controllers and **MetalFX** to round out input and upscaling for the ported experience.

audience_en: Game developers who **want to port Windows/D3D12 games to Apple platforms** and use AI agents to accelerate the port and the Metal 4 conversion.

title: Make your game great with touch
gloss: 用觸控讓你的遊戲更出色
takeaway: 運用 TCTouchController 打造彈性的觸控版面與流暢互動，依情境動態調整按鈕與搖桿，並以自訂內容提供豐富回饋，為遊戲設計出色的觸控操作。
chapters: Create a standard circular button B
Update contents for button B based on context
Hide left thumbstick when not touched
Show power options as touch controls
Use the left half of the screen for character movement
Calculate thumbstick tilt magnitude to trigger sprint
Replace right thumbstick with a touchpad
Collapse two QTE buttons into one
Use button B to aim, move, and release power
Add a halo effect with custom TCControlContents
