points.text: 以 **TCTouchController** 與各種 descriptor 設定觸控控制項，並比較 GCController 的 polling 與 change handlers 兩種輸入方式。
設計**彈性版面**：以 anchor 與 offset 並考量 safe area 配置按鈕，例如標準圓形的 button B。
打造**流暢互動**：依情境更換按鈕圖示、在未觸碰時隱藏搖桿、動態顯示拾取按鈕或能力轉盤。
用螢幕左半 colliderShape 控制角色移動、計算搖桿傾斜量觸發衝刺，並以 **TCTouchpadDescriptor** 取代右搖桿。
透過自訂 **TCControlContents**（如為搖桿加上光暈圖層）提供豐富的視覺回饋。

audience: 適合**在 Apple 平台開發遊戲、想為觸控螢幕設計優質操作體驗的遊戲開發者**。
gloss_en: Make your game great with touch
takeaway_en: Use TCTouchController to build flexible touch layouts and fluid interactions, adjusting buttons and sticks dynamically by context, and provide rich feedback with custom content to design great touch controls for your game.

points_en.text: Set up touch controls with **TCTouchController** and various descriptors, and compare GCController's two input approaches: polling versus change handlers.
Design a **flexible layout**: position buttons with anchors and offsets while accounting for the safe area, such as a standard circular button B.
Build **fluid interactions**: swap button icons by context, hide the stick when not being touched, and dynamically show a pickup button or ability wheel.
Use a colliderShape over the left half of the screen to control character movement, compute the stick's tilt amount to trigger a sprint, and replace the right stick with **TCTouchpadDescriptor**.
Provide rich visual feedback through custom **TCControlContents** (such as adding a glow layer to a stick).

audience_en: **Game developers building on Apple platforms who want to design great controls for touchscreens.**

title: Build real-time neural rendering pipelines with Metal
gloss: 用 Metal 打造即時神經渲染管線
takeaway: 用 Metal 4 將機器學習整合進即時渲染管線，透過 MetalFX 降噪、相機運動向量與內嵌神經網路（tensorOps）提升畫質與效能。
chapters: Deploy custom ML networks with Metal 4

points.text: 用 **Metal 4** 把機器學習整合進**即時渲染管線**，提供實務導入建議。
採用 **MetalFX Denoising** 降噪，提升渲染畫面品質。
在 shader 中計算**僅相機（camera-only）運動向量**，並扣除前後幀的 jitter 子像素偏移。
以 Metal 4 **部署自訂 ML 網路**，整合進渲染流程。
透過 **tensorOps** 把神經網路**內嵌（inline）**到 shader 中執行。

audience: **開發高效能遊戲與即時 3D 渲染的 Metal 開發者**，想把 ML 導入渲染管線的人。
gloss_en: Build real-time neural rendering pipelines with Metal
takeaway_en: Integrate machine learning into a real-time rendering pipeline with Metal 4, improving quality and performance through MetalFX denoising, camera motion vectors, and inline neural networks (tensorOps).

points_en.text: Integrate machine learning into a **real-time rendering pipeline** with **Metal 4**, with practical adoption recommendations.
Use **MetalFX Denoising** to reduce noise and improve rendered frame quality.
Compute **camera-only motion vectors** in the shader, subtracting the sub-pixel jitter offset between consecutive frames.
**Deploy custom ML networks** with Metal 4 and integrate them into the rendering flow.
Run neural networks **inline** within shaders via **tensorOps**.

audience_en: **Metal developers building high-performance games and real-time 3D rendering** who want to bring ML into their rendering pipeline.

title: Find your accessory with Bluetooth Channel Sounding
gloss: 用藍牙通道測距找到你的配件
takeaway: 用 Bluetooth Channel Sounding 透過 Core Bluetooth 或 Nearby Interaction，為藍牙配件帶來距離與方向感知。
chapters: Start a Core Bluetooth Channel Sounding session
Receive distance results and cancel a session
Start a Nearby Interaction Channel Sounding session
Run a Nearby Interaction Channel Sounding session

points.text: **Channel Sounding** 為藍牙配件帶來**距離與方向**感知，可用於尋找配件等情境。
在 **Core Bluetooth** 中先以 **supportsFeatures(.channelSounding)** 檢查支援，再用 **CBChannelSoundingSessionConfiguration** 啟動測距 session。
透過 delegate 接收 **CBChannelSoundingProcedureResults** 取得 **distance**，並可隨時取消 session。
用 **Nearby Interaction** 的 **NINearbyAccessoryConfiguration** 並啟用**相機輔助（camera assistance）**，可額外取得方向（水平角）。

audience: 開發**藍牙配件或尋物類 App、需要距離與方向定位**的硬體與 iOS 開發者。
gloss_en: Find your accessory with Bluetooth Channel Sounding
takeaway_en: Use Bluetooth Channel Sounding through Core Bluetooth or Nearby Interaction to bring distance and direction awareness to Bluetooth accessories.

points_en.text: **Channel Sounding** brings **distance and direction** awareness to Bluetooth accessories, useful for scenarios like finding an accessory.
In **Core Bluetooth**, first check support with **supportsFeatures(.channelSounding)**, then start a ranging session with **CBChannelSoundingSessionConfiguration**.
Receive **CBChannelSoundingProcedureResults** through the delegate to get **distance**, and cancel the session at any time.
Use **Nearby Interaction**'s **NINearbyAccessoryConfiguration** with **camera assistance** enabled to additionally obtain direction (azimuth).

audience_en: Hardware and iOS developers building **Bluetooth accessories or item-finder apps that need distance and direction positioning**.

title: Elevate your app’s text experience with TextKit
gloss: 用 TextKit 提升 App 的文字體驗
takeaway: 結合內建文字視圖的便利與 TextKit 的掌控力,用新 API 做出行號、可折疊段落與可重用的文字附件視圖等進階文字體驗。
chapters: Example: Code editor with line numbers
ContainerView with TextView and line number view
DidLayout: convert frames to viewport coordinates
Draw line numbers in ContainerView closure
Text attachments and view provider reuse
Text attachment view provider reuse policy

points.text: 用新 API**結合內建文字視圖的便利與 TextKit 的底層掌控力**,提升 App 的文字體驗。
新增 **NSTextViewportRenderingSurface** conformance,讓自訂 UIView 直接作為 viewport 的渲染表面(搭配 NSMapTable 快取)。
可在 SwiftUI 中以 **UIViewRepresentable / NSViewRepresentable** 包裝 UITextView/NSTextView。
範例:用 **NSTextViewportLayoutControllerDelegate** 的三個 override + enumerateTextElements 算出起始行號,在 ContainerView 畫行號;另示範可折疊段落。
文字附件可用 **register(_:forTextAttachmentViewProviderType:)** 設定 view provider 的重用策略(如 .onEditingInlineParagraphs)。

audience: **需要進階文字排版(程式碼編輯器、行號、可折疊段落、自訂附件)、想善用 TextKit 的 UIKit/AppKit 開發者。**
gloss_en: Elevate your app's text experience with TextKit
takeaway_en: Combine the convenience of built-in text views with the control of TextKit, using new APIs to build advanced text experiences like line numbers, collapsible paragraphs, and reusable text attachment views.

points_en.text: Use new APIs to **combine the convenience of built-in text views with the low-level control of TextKit**, elevating your app's text experience.
Adds **NSTextViewportRenderingSurface** conformance, letting a custom UIView serve directly as the viewport's rendering surface (with NSMapTable caching).
In SwiftUI, wrap UITextView/NSTextView with **UIViewRepresentable / NSViewRepresentable**.

Example: use **NSTextViewportLayoutControllerDelegate**'s three overrides plus enumerateTextElements to compute the starting line number and draw line numbers in a ContainerView; also demonstrates collapsible paragraphs.
For text attachments, use **register(_:forTextAttachmentViewProviderType:)** to set the view provider's reuse policy (such as .onEditingInlineParagraphs).

audience_en: **UIKit/AppKit developers who need advanced text layout (code editors, line numbers, collapsible paragraphs, custom attachments) and want to make the most of TextKit.**

title: Unwrap PaperKit
gloss: 深入了解 PaperKit
takeaway: 用 PaperKit 全新的資料模型 API 以程式存取、建立與修改畫布上的 markup 元素，並結合 adornments 與 Image Playground 打造互動式畫布應用。

points.text: **PaperKit** 推出全新的**資料模型 API**，可用程式存取、建立與修改畫布上的 markup 元素（`PaperMarkup`、`MarkupOrderedSet`）。
可建立 `ShapeMarkup` 等 subelement，並用 `allowedInteractions = .readOnly` 把模板元素設為唯讀。
用 **adornments**（`MarkupAdornment`）在畫布上加入可點擊的浮動按鈕，並透過 delegate 處理點擊事件。
結合 **Image Playground**（`ImagePlaygroundViewController`）產生圖片，再以 `ImageMarkup` 放置到對應面板中。

audience: **開發畫布、繪圖、筆記或標註類 App，想以程式控制 PaperKit 內容的開發者**。
gloss_en: Unwrap PaperKit
takeaway_en: Use PaperKit's new data model APIs to programmatically access, create, and modify markup elements on the canvas, combining adornments and Image Playground to build interactive canvas apps.

points_en.text: **PaperKit** introduces new **data model APIs** to programmatically access, create, and modify markup elements on the canvas (`PaperMarkup`, `MarkupOrderedSet`).
You can create subelements like `ShapeMarkup` and use `allowedInteractions = .readOnly` to make template elements read-only.
Use **adornments** (`MarkupAdornment`) to add tappable floating buttons on the canvas, handling tap events through a delegate.
Combine with **Image Playground** (`ImagePlaygroundViewController`) to generate images, then place them into the corresponding panel with `ImageMarkup`.

audience_en: **Developers building canvas, drawing, note-taking, or markup apps who want to control PaperKit content programmatically**.

title: Create high-quality images using Image Playground
gloss: 用 Image Playground 產生高品質影像
takeaway: 用 **Image Playground** 在 App 中產生高品質影像，新模型運行於 Private Cloud Compute，並可透過 concepts、參考相片與樣式客製化。
chapters: Add Image Playground sheet with binding to @State
Seeding the sheet with context from your card
Providing a visual suggestion using a drawing
Adopt Image Playground in UIKit or AppKit
Generating an expressive icon for the card thumbnail
Disabling personalization when it doesn't fit your context

points.text: 新的生成式模型運行於 **Private Cloud Compute**，可產出更高品質的影像。
在 SwiftUI 用 **`imagePlaygroundSheet`** 綁定 `@State` 呈現；UIKit／AppKit 則用 `ImagePlaygroundViewController`。
用 `ImagePlaygroundConcept`（`.text`、`.extracted`、`.drawing`）與 `sourceImage` 以情境、參考相片或塗鴉引導生成。
以 `ImagePlaygroundOptions` 設定尺寸（`sizeSpecification`）與樣式（`imagePlaygroundGenerationStyle`，含 `.emoji`、`.externalProvider`），並可關閉個人化。
用 `@Environment(\.supportsImageGeneration)` 檢查裝置是否支援影像生成，再決定提供哪種 UI。

audience: **想在 App 中加入生成式影像建立功能**的 SwiftUI 或 UIKit 開發者。
gloss_en: Create high-quality images using Image Playground
takeaway_en: Use **Image Playground** to create high-quality images in your app, with a new model running on Private Cloud Compute and customization via concepts, reference photos, and styles.

points_en.text: A new generative model runs on **Private Cloud Compute** to produce higher-quality images.
In SwiftUI, present it with **`imagePlaygroundSheet`** bound to `@State`; in UIKit/AppKit, use `ImagePlaygroundViewController`.
Guide generation by context, reference photo, or sketch using `ImagePlaygroundConcept` (`.text`, `.extracted`, `.drawing`) and `sourceImage`.
Set size (`sizeSpecification`) and style (`imagePlaygroundGenerationStyle`, including `.emoji` and `.externalProvider`) with `ImagePlaygroundOptions`, and optionally disable personalization.
Check whether the device supports image generation with `@Environment(\.supportsImageGeneration)` before deciding which UI to offer.

audience_en: SwiftUI or UIKit developers who want to **add generative image creation to their app**.

title: Unlock in-game content with StoreKit and Background Assets
gloss: 用 StoreKit 與 Background Assets 解鎖遊戲內容
takeaway: 透過新的 Unity StoreKit 與 Background Assets 外掛，在遊戲中接上原生 IAP 並以隨選資產包縮減下載量。
chapters: Asset pack manifest for a localized asset pack
Convert Steam depots to asset packs
Convert a Steam depot to an asset pack manifest
Convert an asset pack manifest to an asset pack archive
StoreKit and Background Assets sample code
Fetch and purchase products with the StoreKit plug-in
Listen for Transaction updates with the StoreKit plug-in
Download asset packs with the Background Assets plug-in

points.text: 新的 **Unity StoreKit 外掛** 讓 Unity 遊戲直接使用原生 Apple 內購（IAP）。
用 **Background Assets** 與本地化資產包縮減初始下載量，依語言隨選下載內容。
透過 **xcrun ba-package** 把 Steam depot 轉成 asset pack manifest 與封存檔。
以 **Product.FetchProducts／Purchase** 取得並購買商品，並驗證交易後解鎖內容。
監聽 **Transaction.Updates** 處理消耗型與非消耗型商品，並以 CurrentEntitlements 為權益來源。

audience: 用 **Unity 開發遊戲** 並想整合 Apple 原生 IAP 與資產隨選下載的開發者。
gloss_en: Unlock in-game content with StoreKit and Background Assets
takeaway_en: Use the new Unity StoreKit and Background Assets plug-ins to wire up native IAP in your game and reduce download size with on-demand asset packs.

points_en.text: The new **Unity StoreKit plug-in** lets Unity games use native Apple In-App Purchases (IAP) directly.
Use **Background Assets** and localized asset packs to reduce the initial download size, downloading content on demand by language.
Use **xcrun ba-package** to turn a Steam depot into an asset pack manifest and archive.
Use **Product.FetchProducts / Purchase** to fetch and buy products, and unlock content after verifying the transaction.
Listen to **Transaction.Updates** to handle consumable and non-consumable products, using CurrentEntitlements as the source of truth for entitlements.

audience_en: Developers **building games with Unity** who want to integrate native Apple IAP and on-demand asset downloads.

title: Meet Trust Insights
gloss: 認識 Trust Insights
takeaway: 全新的 Trust Insights 框架以隱私保護方式評估使用者是否正遭社交詐騙或脅迫，協助 App 在風險情境中增加保護摩擦。

points.text: **Trust Insights** 是全新框架，以**隱私保護**方式協助偵測使用者是否正遭**社交詐騙或脅迫**。
透過 **InsightEvaluator** 先 requestAuthorization 取得授權，再用 **IsLikelyBeingCoachedInsight** 請求評估。
結果為 .unknown／.medium／.high 等風險等級，App 可據此調整流程（例如增加確認步驟）。
需以 **reportConsumption**（如 .usedIncreasedFriction）提供**即時消費回饋**，並遵循隱私與最佳實務。

audience: **開發金融、轉帳或通訊類 App**、希望保護使用者免於社交工程詐騙與脅迫的工程師。
gloss_en: Meet Trust Insights
takeaway_en: The new Trust Insights framework assesses, in a privacy-preserving way, whether a user is being socially scammed or coerced, helping apps add protective friction in risky situations.

points_en.text: **Trust Insights** is a new framework that helps detect, in a **privacy-preserving** way, whether a user is being **socially scammed or coerced**.
Use **InsightEvaluator** to first requestAuthorization for permission, then request an assessment with **IsLikelyBeingCoachedInsight**.
Results are risk levels such as .unknown/.medium/.high, so the app can adjust its flow accordingly (for example, adding a confirmation step).
You must provide **real-time consumption feedback** via **reportConsumption** (such as .usedIncreasedFriction) and follow privacy and best practices.

audience_en: **Engineers building finance, money-transfer, or messaging apps** who want to protect users from social-engineering scams and coercion.

title: Inside Apple Intelligence and Xcode: Special Presentation
gloss: 深入 Apple Intelligence 與 Xcode：特別發表
takeaway: 在 Steve Jobs Theater 一次掌握 Xcode 27、App Intents、Foundation Models、Core AI 與 MLX 等 Apple Intelligence 與開發工具的最新進展。

points.text: 於 Steve Jobs Theater 舉行的特別發表，總覽 **Apple Intelligence** 與 **Xcode** 的最新進展。
介紹 **Xcode 27** 如何加速開發流程，是本場的重點段落之一。
說明 **App Intents** 與 **Foundation Models framework** 如何把智慧功能帶進你的 App。
涵蓋 **Core AI** 與 **MLX**，介紹底層 AI 能力與在 Apple 裝置上執行模型的方案。

audience: **想一次掌握 Apple Intelligence 與開發工具走向**的所有 Apple 平台開發者。
gloss_en: Inside Apple Intelligence and Xcode: Special Presentation
takeaway_en: At Steve Jobs Theater, get caught up all at once on the latest advancements in Apple Intelligence and developer tools, including Xcode 27, App Intents, Foundation Models, Core AI, and MLX.

points_en.text: A special presentation held at Steve Jobs Theater, surveying the latest advancements in **Apple Intelligence** and **Xcode**.
Introduces how **Xcode 27** accelerates the development workflow, one of the session's key segments.
Explains how **App Intents** and the **Foundation Models framework** bring intelligent features into your app.
Covers **Core AI** and **MLX**, introducing the underlying AI capabilities and ways to run models on Apple devices.

audience_en: All Apple platform developers who **want to get caught up all at once on the direction of Apple Intelligence and developer tools**.

title: Find and fix performance issues in your Metal games
gloss: 找出並修復 Metal 遊戲的效能問題
takeaway: 用 metalperftrace 收集與分析 Metal 效能追蹤，搭配 StateReporting 將指標對應到遊戲狀態，並以 MetricKit 蒐集實機現場資料，精準定位效能瓶頸。
chapters: Filter by process and emit JSON
Include full state transitions in overview

points.text: 用命令列工具 **metalperftrace** 收集效能追蹤，可指定最近時段或明確時間範圍。
以 **overview** 檢視 FPS、Frame Time、On-GPU Time 等指標，並可依 process 過濾與輸出 JSON。
透過 **StateReporting** 的 **SRStateReporter** 回報狀態轉換與中繼資料，把效能指標對應到遊戲情境（如關卡、畫質）。
用 **--include-state-transitions** 與 **--aggregate** 依狀態彙總指標，找出哪些情境最耗效能。
搭配 **MetricKit** 蒐集使用者實機的現場效能資料，補足實驗室外的真實表現。

audience: 適合**開發 Metal 遊戲、需要診斷與優化 GPU 與整體效能的遊戲與圖形開發者**。
gloss_en: Find and fix performance issues in your Metal games
takeaway_en: Use metalperftrace to collect and analyze Metal performance traces, pair it with StateReporting to map metrics to game state, and gather on-device field data with MetricKit to pinpoint performance bottlenecks.

points_en.text: Collect performance traces with the command-line tool **metalperftrace**, targeting either a recent window or an explicit time range.
Use **overview** to inspect metrics like FPS, Frame Time, and On-GPU Time, with the ability to filter by process and output JSON.
Report state transitions and metadata via **StateReporting**'s **SRStateReporter** to map performance metrics to game context (such as level or quality settings).
Use **--include-state-transitions** and **--aggregate** to summarize metrics by state and find which contexts cost the most performance.
Pair with **MetricKit** to gather real on-device field performance data, filling in the gaps beyond the lab.

audience_en: **Game and graphics developers building Metal games who need to diagnose and optimize GPU and overall performance.**

title: Discover container machines
gloss: 認識 container machines
takeaway: container machine 是 Container 新增的工具，在 Mac 上提供輕量、可持續存在的 Linux 環境，可建立、執行指令並進入互動式 shell。

points.text: **container machine** 是 Container 內建的新工具，在 Mac 上提供**輕量且可持續存在的 Linux 環境**。
說明背後的**容器化（Containerization）**機制與**設計原則**。
可用 `container machine create --name demo --set-default alpine` **建立新的 container machine**。
用 `container machine run` 執行指令（如 echo、uname），或**進入互動式 shell**。
以 `container machine list` 列出現有環境，並可在其中**執行應用程式**。

audience: **需要在 Mac 上跑 Linux 環境的開發者**，想用輕量持久容器做開發或測試的人。
gloss_en: Discover container machines
takeaway_en: A container machine is a new tool in Container that provides a lightweight, persistent Linux environment on Mac, where you can create it, run commands, and enter an interactive shell.

points_en.text: A **container machine** is a new built-in tool in Container that provides a **lightweight, persistent Linux environment** on Mac.
